programme.title: Movie: A Christmas Wedding
programme.desc: Emily and Ben's perfect Christmas wedding is about to fall apart; Emily becomes stranded.

programme.title: Movie: On Strike for Christmas
programme.desc: A mother goes on strike when all of her efforts for a perfect family Christmas get taken for granted. Chaos ensues when she convinces all the other neighbourhood mothers to join in, and the strike takes on a life of its own when the local news finds out.

programme.title: Movie: Heaven Sent
programme.desc: A runaway child rekindles a couple's love when it is all but over.

programme.title: Movie: Three Holiday Tails
programme.desc: A couple's family and friends work together to have a Christmas to remember.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Charles Manson: The Devil's Work
programme.desc: This episode details the horror of Charles Manson's vicious attacks and explains how he was able to convince his hippie followers to brutally murder innocent strangers.

programme.title: Very Scary People: John Wayne Gacy: Evil Secret
programme.desc: This is the shocking and gruesome mystery of John Wayne Gacy, a popular Chicago businessman and part-time clown who was leading a double life in the 1970s. By day he was a community leader and by night a predator of young men.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Zodiac Killer: I Am The Zodiac
programme.desc: He terrorized Northern California in the late 1960s. He also taunted the public with cryptic clues, threats of violence and most famously, ciphers that were supposed to lead police to his identity, but mostly went nowhere.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Good as Gold
programme.desc: Two young women are killed by a mysterious intruder. Investigators hope that his unusual brand of cigarettes and new advances in DNA technology can paint a picture of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Storage
programme.desc: Tracy Jo Shine grew up in a middle-class home in Houston, Texas. Unfortunately, when she attended a prestigious high school she began experimenting with drugs. When she went missing, her family suspected her new friends from school.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Treading Not So Lightly
programme.desc: When a four-year-old girl is found unconscious in a parking lot, police concluded it was a hit and run vehicle accident, and left it at that. But the girl's mother was determined to find out exactly what had happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Without a Prayer
programme.desc: Madalyn Murray O'Hair and her two top lieutenants disappeared with no shortage of suspects. Her abduction may never have been solved if it weren't for the discovery of a headless, handless body, and the serial number on an artificial hip.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sealed With a Kiss
programme.desc: For more than a year, angry, hateful letters were sent to a first grade school teacher in a small town in Pennsylvania. When scientists analyzed the letters, they found evidence that the sender knew a lot about the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Postal Mortem
programme.desc: On October 15, 1985, two bombs rocked Salt Lake City and resulted in two deaths. A third explosion occurred the next day, but this time the victim survived. Police believed that the survivor is more than an innocent by-stander.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Killing Room
programme.desc: Investigators faced a daunting task: to prove Scott Dunn had been murdered, even though they had no body, no weapon, and no witnesses.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ultimate Betrayal
programme.desc: Fire sweeps through a mansion, killing two children, all evidence leads to the mother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Broken Promises
programme.desc: A tape recorded by a popular gym teacher before his own death tells the true story of his strange marriage and his wife's insatiable greed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Time Will Tell
programme.desc: A Canadian financier assumes the name of a co-worker as part of a money-laundering scheme. The man turns up dead in the ocean, with an anchor tied around his torso.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Material Evidence
programme.desc: Examine intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Kill'igraphy
programme.desc: A man considered unstable by his neighbors is accused of killing his wife, but the medical examiner disagrees.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Textbook Murder
programme.desc: A woman is brutally murdered and police point to her fiancé when they learn that he was having affairs with other women. It is not until a man comes forward with information that he is no longer a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Social Circle
programme.desc: Four young adults are brutally murdered in an affluent Texas neighbourhood, and the crime scene yields little evidence. The next door neighbours see two people in black walking nearby and their descriptions become a key element in solving the case.

programme.title: Something's Killing Me: It's In Your Brain
programme.desc: Doctors and the CDC in Atlanta spent months trying to figure out what California honeymooners, a surfer in Hawaii and a toddler in Tennessee have in common.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Aileen Wuornos: Monster Made
programme.desc: A look at the dealmakers and hangers-on surrounding convicted serial killer Aileen Wuornos known as ''America's first female serial killer.'

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Infested: Sleepless in Quintana Roo
programme.desc: Bug-filled nights and persistent rain quickly take their toll on a single mom and a life coach who have teamed up to tackle the Mexican jungles of Quintana Roo.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Infested: Forage, Trap, Kill
programme.desc: A former cop and a wild child clash over cuddling in the Panamanian jungle, eventually leading to one succumbing to the rigors of the wild and the other having to forage, trap and kill for survival.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Infested: Attack of the Killer Bees
programme.desc: A team of survivalists are threatened by killer bees and other aggressive, disease-carrying insects in the jungles of Panama.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Infested: Warble in the Jungle
programme.desc: Jaguars, venomous snakes and powerful storms all threaten the evolving partnership of an endurance athlete and stay-at-home dad in the rugged Belize jungle.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Infested: Jungle Blood
programme.desc: A nature-loving mom and a mountain climber team up against relentless insects in a vast cave system. A pair of survivalists are exposed to swarms of mosquitos in the Amazon and a duo battles bloodthirsty bugs in the Malaysian rain forest.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Infested: Frigid and Violent
programme.desc: A pair takes on jaguars and other predators in the dangerous jungles of Belize. Later, a duo faces extreme hunger and frigid temperatures in the mountains of Croatia. Finally, a team is challenged by wet conditions and trench foot in Ecuador.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Terror in Tanzania
programme.desc: Two survivalists take on the African Serengeti to survive for 21 days with no food, water or clothes.

programme.title: Dude, You're Screwed: Conquering Alaska
programme.desc: John, our extreme survival instructor, is put to the test as he's taken down in broad daylight and dropped on an Alaskan glacier with little more than a pool cue to defend himself.

programme.title: Dude, You're Screwed: Green Hell
programme.desc: Matt, our primitive skills expert, is snatched from his surfboard and dumped into the Costa Rican jungle in his flip-flops. Treacherous waterfalls, poisonous snakes and blood-sucking ticks abound.

programme.title: River Of No Return: Roaring Back To Life
programme.desc: As the winter ice thaws, Idaho's River of No Return flows, and the people living on its violent shores navigate the raging spring rapids. The small community hustles to work, so they can survive another season in this rugged and dangerous backcountry.

programme.title: River Of No Return: Bearing Down on the Ranch
programme.desc: A predatory bear stalks a homestead forcing the rancher to aggressively protect himself and his cattle. A jetboat engine failure in the river rapids puts Buck's operation in jeopardy. A violent storm forces bush pilots to make an emergency landing.

programme.title: River Of No Return: Rapid Response
programme.desc: When a rafter goes overboard, a legendary jetboat captain springs into action to save the man before the river's rapids claim another victim. Heavy rains threaten to destroy Aubrey's ranch. She calls in air support to help save her barn.

programme.title: River Of No Return: Horsepower Up
programme.desc: With the rapids raging, Buck trains a new jetboat captain: his 8-year old son Dax. Ranch Caretaker Aubrey tends to her pregnant mare during a risky delivery. In the skies above, a bush pilot maildrop goes terribly wrong.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Flying Blind
programme.desc: Repo Man Ken Cage attempts to nab two high-end yachts in two days. Kevin Lacey's favour for a friend turns into a white-knuckle landing under darkening Texas skies in a plane with no radio on a runway with no lights.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Armed on Arrival
programme.desc: Mike Kennedy calls in his 'A-Team' in order to snag a Czechoslovakian fighter jet. Ken Cage and Danny Thompson go after a $2-million Citation CJ1 and end up under fire. Kevin Lacey has a run in with an old adversary at the Sundance Air Show.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: The Blonde Bomber
programme.desc: Always one to push the limits, Mike Kennedy attempts his first helicopter heist. Danny puts his partnership with Ken in jeopardy when he steps out on his own to repossess a Cessna 340. Kevin uses his new protégé as bait to snatch a 1941 Stearman biplane.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: No Safe Harbor
programme.desc: Mike and his wife go undercover to repo a go-fast boat. Ken and Danny bring in some talented friends to pull off a rare simultaneous triple repo, and Kevin attempts to swipe a deadbeat flight school's entire fleet of Cessnas.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Hired Guns
programme.desc: Ken Cage and Danny Thompson repo a tour bus. Kevin Lacey faces armed guards on a nighttime repo, and Mike Kennedy is caught in a gun-smuggling operation.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Diving for Repos
programme.desc: In Florida, Mike Kennedy goes underwater to seize a seaplane. Meanwhile, Ken Cage and Danny Thompson chase a debtor who's fooling them with phony flight plans.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Crisis in the Klondike
programme.desc: A crisis in the Klondike forces Parker, Rick and Tony to take massive gambles to strike it rich and hunt for gold on new grounds. The setback hits just as the price of gold spikes, sparking a new gold rush to the area.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Before the 90 Days: Tell All Part 2
programme.desc: In part two, host Shaun Robinson dives back in to discuss more of the biggest moments with our couples and updates on where their relationships stand now.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Grave Diagnosis
programme.desc: A teenage girl is impaled through the neck on an iron fence; a patient is convinced he's turning into a vampire; to save the life of a critically ill pregnant woman, a first-year attending physician has to stand up to a room full of senior specialists.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Zombie Uprising
programme.desc: A Halloween zombie with a problem below the belt mystifies doctors. Later, a doctor makes mistake that amazingly explains a patient's condition.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Headaches and Zombies
programme.desc: A violent patient who cannot be sedated endangers a pregnant ER doctor. An unexplained headache turns life threatening for a mom during a vacation, while a man with a fencepost through his torso jumps the triage line on a busy night in the ER.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Halloween in the ER
programme.desc: A mysterious white dog wanders the hospital halls on Halloween. A neurologist encounters an unconscious motorcyclist on the side of the road. The treatment of a young boy's broken leg turns into an investigation that might reveal child abuse.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Grave Diagnosis

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Halloween in the ER
programme.desc: A mysterious white dog wanders the hospital halls on Halloween. A neurologist encounters an unconscious motorcyclist on the side of the road. The treatment of a young boy's broken leg turns into an investigation that might reveal child abuse.

programme.title: Long Lost Family: There's More to Saying Sorry
programme.desc: As the new relationship with her biological mother flourishes, an adoptee is able to put to rest demons that have plagued her entire life. In order to move forward, two sisters decide to confront their birth father after a lifetime of feeling abandoned.

programme.title: Long Lost Family: Always Secretly Looking For You
programme.desc: Newly reunited sisters face a battle that strengthens their bond and uncover another secret held by their mother. And two families explore the complicated relationship of sharing a son.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: Young, Wild and Three
programme.desc: The quints are full blown 'threenagers' now and Danielle and Adam must figure out how to get their discipline under control. Meanwhile, Adam tries to balance working from home, but after Ava gets sick, the Busbys make a shocking discovery in their house.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: Our Home Is Sick
programme.desc: The quints have their first sleepover at the Mills when the Busbys are forced to leave their home for a few days. Fearing for the girls' health after prolonged exposure to mold, Danielle and Adam bring them to the doctor to find out if they are at risk.

programme.title: Long Lost Family: She Chose Another Person Over Her Child
programme.desc: Lisa helps a man locate his birth mother hoping to answer why she chose to marry a man that didn't want him in their lives. A woman enlists Chris's help to search for the biological mother who abandoned her at a babysitter's house when she was an infant.

programme.title: Long Lost Family: Why Couldn't They Raise Us?
programme.desc: Identical twins enlist Lisa's help to unlock the mystery of why they were placed for adoption. Chris hopes to fulfill the wishes of a deceased father by tracking down the first-born son he and his wife placed for adoption when they were young lovers.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: On the Road; Las Vegas I
programme.desc: Theresa is on the road surprising lucky fans with readings in Las Vegas. The whole Caputo family comes along and takes in the best Vegas has to offer. Later, Theresa surprises a woman at her bachelorette party.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: On the Road: Las Vegas II
programme.desc: Theresa scrambles to save the surprise when the woman she's come to give a reading shows up early. Later, even Theresa gets a surprise when a woman's deceased son makes his presence known.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Out of Control
programme.desc: A golfer requires life-saving surgery when doctors get no response. Three scantily clad adults cause problems in the ER. Also, a runner pushes himself past his limit, and a man is shot by accident by his own brother.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Twist and Shout
programme.desc: A newlywed's hand gets stuck in a kitchen appliance. A college student is tormented by an injury down under. A heavy drinker is now sober and experiencing life-threatening complications. A woman appears to only have blood flow to half of her brain.

programme.title: Gypsy Sisters: The Blame Game
programme.desc: As the family stands firmly divided, Nettie learns an unsettling truth.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Divas on the Defense
programme.desc: Bride Jenny and her fashion diva bridesmaid battle over to wear or not to wear lace. Gretchen comes back to the salon to try on her custom-made gown.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Secrets of a Double Life

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Rocking the Cradle

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The New Normal

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Somewhere Over the Cuckoo's Nest
programme.desc: Kris starts dating someone after 25 years with Bruce, and no one is more critical than her daughters. Khloé ends up in hot water over a controversial Instagram post, and Kim gets a lesson in manners when she tries to recruit Kourtney for her video game.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Carfather

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Cruel and Unusual Punishment

programme.title: Victor and Valentino: A New Don
programme.desc: When Vic and Val discover that Don isn’t really himself it’s up to them to use his kooky codex of conspiracies to save him.

programme.title: Victor and Valentino: Tez Says
programme.desc: Vic & Val are in awe of the new magician in town, but things go awry when they agree to help him out with a new trick – despite Chata’s wishes.

programme.title: Victor and Valentino: It Grows
programme.desc: As everyone celebrates Valentino for growing his first facial hair, a jealous Vic resorts to magical methods to grow a mustache and compete for attention.

programme.title: Victor and Valentino: Band For Life
programme.desc: Vic and Val tag along with Xochi to a punk concert; they want to prove that they’re cool enough to hang out with her.

programme.title: Victor and Valentino: Lonely Haunts Club
programme.desc: Instead of celebrating Valentine’s Day, Vic and Val explore a haunted mansion with their rivals, Charlene and Pineapple.

programme.title: Victor and Valentino: Lonely Haunts Club 2: Doll Island
programme.desc: In order to prove their bravery, V&V head to a haunted island to retrieve a special doll, but Charlene and Pineapple are intent on getting it first.

programme.title: Victor and Valentino: Los Cadejos
programme.desc: Val holds a grudge against Vic, unwittingly attracting an evil cadejo, a mythological wolf-like beast.

programme.title: Victor and Valentino: Escape From Bebe Bay
programme.desc: When Vic and Val accidently turn themselves and Don into babies, they must escape a daycare center in order to change back to their normal ages.

programme.title: Victor and Valentino: Cuddle Monster
programme.desc: After being told by Chata that they can’t get a pet, Vic & Val adopt a wild lizard, unaware of its magical properties, and decide to keep it a secret from Chata.

programme.title: Victor and Valentino: The Great Bongo Heist
programme.desc: The boys forget to get Chata a gift for Abuela Day and in a panicked move, they pretend that the bongo drums they borrowed from Xochi are for her.

programme.title: Victor and Valentino: Boss for a Day
programme.desc: When Chata lets Vic be the boss of the taco stand for the day Vic decides to fire Val, which has disastrous consequences.

programme.title: Victor and Valentino: Balloon Boys
programme.desc: Vic and Val go on a hot air balloon trip with Sal and compete to be his favorite, but things go awry when they try to use the magical Nazca Lines to their advantage.

programme.title: Victor and Valentino: Welcome to the Underworld
programme.desc: After Vic loses a wrestling match, Vic and Val journey to the underworld to seek advice from their uncle, a famous wrestler named El Toro.

programme.title: Victor and Valentino: El Silbon
programme.desc: Victor sets up a haunted corn maze, but the town kids think its lame. Vic decides to make the maze scarier by enlisting the help of El Silbon (The Whistler) to really scare the kids, but El Silbon has plans of his own.

programme.title: Victor and Valentino: Tree Buds
programme.desc: Vic and Val build a treehouse and Val dismisses Vic with a frivolous task so he can build the treehouse exactly how he wants. But when Vic returns unknowingly with a branch from El Arbol Vampiro, Val’s perfect treehouse turns into a nightmare!

programme.title: American Dad!: Poltergasm
programme.desc: Francine's ghost starts to haunt the Smith household when she is unsatisfied by Stan in the sack, and Roger must conjure a medium named Zelda Rubinstein to help eliminate the ghost. Meanwhile, Hayley introduces her new boy-toy, Mauricio, to the family.

programme.title: American Dad!: The Witches of Langley
programme.desc: Steve and his friends take up witchcraft to gain power and popularity at school. Stan and Klaus become obsessed with remembering 90s bands.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Teen-A-Witch
programme.desc: With Halloween quickly approaching, Tina reveals her brilliant idea that will finally win her first place in the annual costume contest. When Tammy steals her idea, Tina is forced to seek the help of Mr. Ambrose.

programme.title: Tanked!: The Pirate Queen

programme.title: Tanked!: Penn and Teller Monkey Magic
programme.desc: Wayde and Brett drop in on world famous magicians, Penn and Teller who want a tank built in honor of their 40th anniversary together. This double-sided tank will reside in their quirky backstage Monkey Room.

programme.title: Tanked!: Tricks and Trees
programme.desc: Wayde and Brett head to Camp Oak at Ojai Valley Inn & Spa and are challenged to build an aquarium inside the trunk of an oak tree.

programme.title: Tanked: Sea-lebrity Edition: Surf and Turf Tanks
programme.desc: When a restaurant wants to splash with customers they not only need great food, but an eye catching tank to captivate diners. A St. Augustine seafood staple is looking to get the two tank treatment from ATM.

programme.title: Tanked!: Gangster Tank
programme.desc: The Mob Museum makes Wayde and Brett an offer they can't refuse. They want a tank with replica sunken rumrunner for their prohibition exhibit and speakeasy in downtown Las Vegas.

programme.title: Tanked!: Kurt Busch's Tank-a-Dega 500
programme.desc: ATM start your engines because NASCAR driver Kurt Busch wants to get tanked. Kurt and his wife are requesting a little piece of paradise inside their aquarium. They want to replicate their wedding location.

programme.title: Tanked: Sea-lebrity Edition: Surf and Turf Tanks
programme.desc: When a restaurant wants to splash with customers they not only need great food, but an eye catching tank to captivate diners. A St. Augustine seafood staple is looking to get the two tank treatment from ATM.

programme.title: Tanked!: Gangster Tank
programme.desc: The Mob Museum makes Wayde and Brett an offer they can't refuse. They want a tank with replica sunken rumrunner for their prohibition exhibit and speakeasy in downtown Las Vegas.

programme.title: Tanked!: Kurt Busch's Tank-a-Dega 500
programme.desc: ATM start your engines because NASCAR driver Kurt Busch wants to get tanked. Kurt and his wife are requesting a little piece of paradise inside their aquarium. They want to replicate their wedding location.

programme.title: Tanked!: Hang Ten Barbeque
programme.desc: The guys bring the ocean to life with a pipeline wave tank, a new shape for ATM. Home in Vegas, the guys create a smoker tank for The Rolling Smoke BBQ.

programme.title: Tanked!: Healing Garden Waterfall
programme.desc: Lifestyle brand Salt Life needs Wayde and Brett's help again. This time they want an aquarium even BIGGER and BETTER than the original. Closer to home, the guys get asked to build a custom acrylic waterfall as part of a memorial in Las Vegas.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: America's Deadliest Snakes
programme.desc: Steve and Terri travel across the U.S. in search of remarkable rattlesnake species. Steve has a close call with Timber Rattlers in Virginia. In Florida, they find snakes as diverse as the Pigmy Rattler and the large Eastern Diamondback.

programme.title: Too Cute!: Extra Special Pets
programme.desc: Five little piggies overcome their shy nature to befriend the family dog.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: My Cat Eats Everything!
programme.desc: Mark and Angela have to childproof their home because their cat, Gus eats everything.

programme.title: The Vet Life: The Pig Whisperers
programme.desc: Dr. Blue takes on an urgent case after a pit bull suffers a raccoon attack. Dr. Ross takes on an aggressive ferret, and the vets test out their pig whispering skills at an animal rescue. The doctors have a surprise announcement for their wives.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: A Fighting Spirit
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff helps a puppy after it is kicked in the head by a donkey, and later goes fishing for a hook stuck in a hungry beagle's throat. Dr. Amy helps a cat unable to walk and Dr. Nichols gets caught up in a wrestling match with an alpaca.

programme.title: The Zoo: Walk on the Wild Side
programme.desc: The future of the American bison depends on a high-stakes race across the country. The reptile staff have their hands full with a diamond rattlesnake that needs to be medicated orally. A pair of cheetahs is trained to walk the grounds of the zoo.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Make Way for Baby Giraffe
programme.desc: Giraffe Orla is pregnant, but with the size of a giraffe calf and the length of their legs, the birth is always a risky process. As she goes into labor during the day, the keepers must watch from the sidelines, but will baby Narus arrive safely?

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: The Pitz Carlton
programme.desc: Lizzy and Elise struggle to rescue a dehydrated dog in the blazing heat. An anxious, abandoned dog is moved to a new warehouse for dogs with special needs. And, Tia and the twins help a friend of the rescue find the perfect match.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Love at First Sight
programme.desc: Tia's son Kanani, and his fiancée M2, prepare for their wedding. Parolee Jammall finds an abandoned dog and asks Mariah for help rescuing it. Plus, a mother and son visit Villalobos hoping to find a new friend for their family dog.

programme.title: How Do Animals Do That?: Cheesy Mice and Flatulent Manatees
programme.desc: In this episode, we take a look at how thousands of bats take to the air without colliding. Then, we wonder if mice really love cheese and how cats jump so high.

programme.title: How Do Animals Do That?: Flying Whales and Hippo Sunscreen
programme.desc: In this episode, we find out why dogs tilt their heads, how massive humpback whales propel themselves into the air. Then, a look at whether hippos sweat blood and why animals swarm.

programme.title: How Do Animals Do That?: Smart Pups and Fish Baths
programme.desc: In this episode, we take a look at how fish take a bath, how polar bears stay warm, whether your pet pup is smarter than a wolf, and how spiders float in the air for hundreds of miles.

programme.title: How Do Animals Do That?: Headbanging Birds and Unsinkable Ants
programme.desc: In this episode, we take a look at how woodpeckers avoid concussions, why giraffes' tongues are black, how ants survive a flood and how octopuses squeeze into tiny spaces.

programme.title: Movie: The Call
programme.desc: A 911 operator takes a call from a young girl who's has been abducted. She must use all her quick thinking in order to save the girl and make sure the man responsible is brought to justice.

programme.title: Movie: Kidnap
programme.desc: A single mother takes her son to an amusement park where he gets abducted. She goes to the police, but realizes that she doesn't have the time to wait for their help. Taking her son's safety into her own hands, she pursues the abductor relentlessly.

programme.title: Movie: Meet the Blacks
programme.desc: The Black family decides to leave their Chicago home for Beverly Hills after they unexpectedly come into some money. Their newfound bliss in L.A. is short-lived, though, when they arrive to discover that it's the annual purge night.

programme.title: Martin: Crunchy Drawers
programme.desc: Martin has a dream in which he's attracted to Pam.

programme.title: Martin: You Play Too Much

programme.title: Martin: Ain't That About a Ditch
programme.desc: Gina's mother comes to visit while she is away and wants to spend time with Martin.

programme.title: Martin: Three Men and a Mouse

programme.desc: Stan decides to hire a new female co-host for Martin's show to boost the ratings. At first Martin feels threatened by the move, and is very stand-offish.

programme.title: Martin: Blackboard Jungle Fever
programme.desc: When Martin returns to his elementary school for Career Day, he discovers his favourite third grade teacher, Ms. Trinidad, is still teaching there. As they catch up, she makes a pass at Martin while Gina watches.

programme.title: Martin: The Night He Came Home
programme.desc: On Halloween, Martin and his friends gather at his apartment to share ghost stories.

programme.title: Martin: I've Got a Secret
programme.desc: Pam, Tommy and Cole are angry at Martin and Gina when Martin reveals Pam's secret on his show. Martin and Gina's only friends left are Martin's boss Stan and Stan's girlfriend.

programme.title: Meet the Browns: Meet the Non-Frequent Flyer
programme.desc: Everything goes wrong that possibly could when Brown takes his first airplane flight. Later, Derek uses a case of mistaken identity to his advantage.

programme.title: Meet the Browns: Meet the Football Coach
programme.desc: Cora becomes coach of the football team, leading them to win their first game ever. Later, Sasha is introduced to Simone's mother who is less than thrilled about him.

programme.title: Black-ish: Johnson & Johnson
programme.desc: Dre's sister, Rhonda, is getting married to her girlfriend, Sharon, and the upcoming nuptials lead to a conversation on tradition. Dre finds out that Bow is against the patriarchal convention of taking the man's last name.

programme.title: Black-ish: The Johnson Show
programme.desc: Dre has always strived to mirror his life after the model families he grew up watching on TV. When news spreads that Stevens & Lido is going through layoffs, Dre panics that his family's reputation will be tarnished if he loses his job.

programme.title: Black-ish: Good-ish Times
programme.desc: Dre dreams himself into an episode of the classic series from the 1970s with his whole family filling the roles of that classic sitcom.

programme.title: Black-ish: Daddy Dre-Care
programme.desc: The flu is going around the Johnson household, and with things in flux at work, Dre tries to avoid catching the bug at all costs. Dre has to step up and take care of the whole family.

programme.title: Black-ish: Jacked o' Lantern
programme.desc: Ever since he was a kid, Dre has loved Halloween. Now that he lives in one of those 'good candy neighborhoods,' kids come from all over the city to trick-or-treat, including Dre’s own nieces and nephews.

programme.title: Black-ish: The Purge
programme.desc: After Junior embarrasses Dre during a basketball game, Dre decides to remind Junior of his master pranking skills so he’ll never challenge him again.

programme.title: Black-ish: Super Rich Kids
programme.desc: Dre has always felt his older son was never like him, but when he finally meets Junior's cool friends, Dre is all in and happy that his son may have the opportunity for an actual social life.

programme.title: Black-ish: The Leftovers
programme.desc: When Dre and Bow realize they don't have a legal guardian for their kids, they make it their mission to find replacement parents should anything happen to them. Meanwhile, Zoey and Junior reveal the truth to Jack about their old dog's death.

programme.title: Movie: Fat Albert
programme.desc: Fat Albert and his friends leave the cartoon world behind them and come to life to help a lonely teenager make some friends. The young girl is very withdrawn but the gang helps her come out of her shell as they adapt to the modern, real world.

programme.title: Movie: I Know What You Did Last Summer

programme.title: Movie: Jeepers Creepers 3

programme.title: Snapped: Eric Copple
programme.desc: On Halloween night a knife-wielding intruder attacks and kills two roommates and leaves another lucky to be alive. Although the story is reminiscent to the plot of a horror film – for this California town the terror is all too real.

programme.title: Snapped: Barbara Garcia
programme.desc: Trick-or-treaters in a small Indiana town have no idea that the sweet grandmother passing out candy is also hiding a deadly secret in her garage.

programme.title: Snapped: Daniel Clay
programme.desc: After a massive Halloween bash ends with a young woman’s mysterious disappearance, a tiny farming town fears that evil stalks its fields.

programme.title: Snapped: Cynthia Alvarez
programme.desc: As Halloween approaches in southern California, a family of three mysteriously goes missing. During their search for answers, investigators unearth a haunting message that points to murder.

programme.title: Snapped: William Dennis
programme.desc: A horrific murder of a young mother on Halloween night sends California investigators on the hunt for a costumed killer.

programme.title: Dateline: What Happened to the Beauty Queen?
programme.desc: A local beauty queen is found beaten to death in her home, conflicting physical evidence leaves the detectives and the townspeople at odds.

programme.title: Dateline: Mystery at Payson Canyon
programme.desc: A man took pride in preparing for every possible threat, so when he was found dead at home, those who know him were stunned.

programme.title: Dateline: Along Came Jodi
programme.desc: A man and woman had chemistry right from the start. Then he was killed and she was arrested. The trial riveted millions, exposing Jodi's secret.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Night Hannah Hill Disappeared
programme.desc: A former homecoming queen taking her first steps into adult life is brutally murdered. Who would want to harm her? The investigation centered on two men and a mysterious black bag that seemed to come out of nowhere.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: While They Were Sleeping
programme.desc: It was a brutal and baffling crime: a husband shot dead in his own bed. No one else in the house was hurt, not even his wife, who was sleeping beside him. Investigators were suspicious, but there were more surprises in store.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Secrets and Lies
programme.desc: The fire broke out before dawn. After the smoke cleared, a mother of two young children was found dead. It was the tragic end to a life that held so much promise, but for investigators, it was just the beginning.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Family Affair
programme.desc: When the wealthy heir to a legendary hotel is murdered, the list of possible suspects is long. He had his share of enemies, and a complicated family. Investigators soon learned someone close to the victim was also in danger.

programme.title: Snapped: Melissa Cole
programme.desc: A suspicious fire hides a deadly secret and forces a son to testify against his only remaining parent.

programme.title: Snapped: Katey Passaniti
programme.desc: A man’s last will and testament points police to his murderer.

programme.title: Snapped: Laurie Jean Cone
programme.desc: A deadly break-in pits mother against daughter, revealing a secret addiction.

programme.title: Snapped: Lateisha Jandreau
programme.desc: The search for a missing man leads investigators to a surprising discovery.

programme.title: Snapped: Dawn Silvernail
programme.desc: The murder of a church choir member uncovers a sordid secret and an unlikely love triangle.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Plot Thickens
programme.desc: It’s a true Hollywood whodunit. A show business stuntman was shot four times and left to die. Investigators uncovered a love story gone wrong and a villain with a dark secret. But the most stunning twist of all is what didn’t happen.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Secrets in Seattle
programme.desc: Nicole Pietz was a well-liked fitness executive married to the man of her dreams. Then one night, she didn't show up for dinner with her husband and friends.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XVI
programme.desc: Mr. Burns invites Homer and his friends to his big estate for a hunting tournament, but Homer and the gang learn they are the ones being hunted. The Simpsons adopt David, an artificial robot son, after Bart falls into a coma.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XVII
programme.desc: A meteor falls to Earth and reveals a green goo that Homer mistakes for marshmallow. Bart brings Golem to life and forces him to carry out his bidding. A radio broadcast convinces the people of Springfield that they're in the midst of an alien invasion.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XVIII
programme.desc: The fright fest begins in 'Mr. and Mrs. Simpson' as Homer and Marge leave for what appears to be an ordinary day. But Homer is living a double life as a secret agent, and he is assigned to eliminate Kent Brockman.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XIX
programme.desc: Homer kills off celebrities so their likenesses can be exploited free-of-charge. Transformer-like robots duke it out in Springfield. Lisa accompanies Milhouse to a pumpkin patch to await the appearance of the Grand Pumpkin, who finally appears.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XX
programme.desc: Lisa is livid with Miss Hoover and, in a series of homages to classic Hitchcock stories, she sets out for deadly revenge. Krusty's fast-food sandwich transforms news anchor Kent Brockman into an enraged zombie. Also, Homer is impaled in Moe's tavern.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XXI
programme.desc: Marge, worried about the effects of excessively violent video games, encourages Bart and Milhouse to give wholesome, classic board games a shot. Then, Lisa likes a boy who happens to be a vampire.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XXII
programme.desc: Homer takes a dangerous dive into an isolated canyon on Candy Peak, but when a crashing boulder traps his arm, he channels the spirit of Aron Ralston to save himself.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XXIII
programme.desc: A Mayan Homer and Marge are witnesses to the prediction that 2012 will be the end of the world, the Springfield Subatomic Supercollider creates a black hole that terrorizes the city and Bart travels back in time to 1974.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XXIV
programme.desc: Homer rides around Springfield wreaking havoc as 'The Fat in The Hat' in a rhyming Dr. Seuss-ian tale. In 'Dead and Shoulders,' Bart is beheaded during a kite accident and his head is attached to Lisa's body.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XXV
programme.desc: On the annual spooktacular Halloween special, Bart and Lisa are transported to a demon-filled alternate universe after Bart reads a set of Aramaic symbols he finds on the underside of his desk.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XXVI
programme.desc: In the annual frightfest Halloween episode, Sideshow Bob finally kills Bart, only to reanimate him. Homer wakes up with short-term memory loss, and Lisa, Bart and Milhouse get super powers from radiation.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XXVII
programme.desc: Mr. Burns introduces a 'Hunger Games'-style contest in which Springfield's children must fight each other, and Lisa's imaginary best friend becomes jealous of Lisa's real best friends.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XXVIII
programme.desc: Maggie becomes possessed by an ancient demon, Lisa discovers a creepy yet perfect version of her family in an alternate universe and Homer cannibalizes himself.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Halloween of Horror
programme.desc: When Lisa becomes scared at the Krustyland Halloween Horror Night, Homer is forced to take down his Everscream Terrors decorations. Halloween pop-up employees seek vengeance on Homer for causing them to lose their jobs.

programme.desc: A vampire travels to England to seduce a visitor's fiancé and manages to wreak havoc.

programme.title: Movie: Ghost Ship

programme.title: Movie: Thirteen Ghosts
programme.desc: A family inherits a wealthy uncle's estate, including a glass house filled with vicious ghosts. Now they must search for a way out the house before they become trapped forever, even beyond death.

programme.title: Movie: Pride and Prejudice and Zombies
programme.desc: Five sisters in 19th-century England search for suitable husbands while fending off the undead hordes.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Utopia

programme.title: Attenborough and the Giant Elephant

programme.title: Planet Earth: Dynasties: Lions
programme.desc: The lioness leader of a once mighty pride must now battle for their very survival.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Dynasties: Chimpanzee

programme.title: Planet Earth: Dynasties: Tiger
programme.desc: A tigress fends off rivals set on taking over her turf, all while protecting her young cubs.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Dynasties: Painted Wolf
programme.desc: The dynasty is threatened when a pained wolf matriarch feuds with her daughter.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Dynasties: Emperor Penguin

programme.title: Frozen Planet: To the Ends of the Earth
programme.desc: The polar regions experience the planet's most extreme seasons and are home to some of its most surprising animal behaviours. Polar bears search and fight for mates, penguins surf and orcas hunt collaboratively.

programme.title: Frozen Planet: Spring
programme.desc: Spring arrives in the poles and the sun appears after many months of darkness, as do the adelie penguins. In the Antarctic, the sun seems welcoming but its return triggers fierce katabatic winds.

programme.title: Frozen Planet: Summer
programme.desc: The summertime is a time when the harshest environments on Earth temporarily become favourable for most. While the sun never sets, life speeds up for polar wildlife in a race to raise their young.

programme.title: Frozen Planet: Autumn
programme.desc: For the animals of the Polar Regions, time is running out in the autumn. The Arctic Ocean freezes over and the sea ice advances around Antarctica.

programme.title: Frozen Planet: Winter
programme.desc: There is no greater challenge for life than winter in the Polar Regions. As temperatures plummet to 70 degrees below zero Fahrenheit, witness the greatest test of survival on the planet.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: World's Scariest Places
programme.desc: Some of the world's scariest places are abandoned buildings and failed engineering projects, and using cutting-edge tech, experts unravel the dark secrets and bloody stories inside these strange ruins.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Journey to Outcast Island
programme.desc: On a desolate island near Greece, abandoned buildings are evidence of a group of people that were forbidden to leave. Experts reveal who was forced to stay here and if there was a cover-up to conceal what really happened at this strange place.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Secrets of the Terror Tunnels
programme.desc: A vast system of tunnels built almost three thousand years ago was the site of the greatest battles of antiquity, and these disorienting passages could be the deadliest weapon in war. Experts reveal what made this underground world so terrifying.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Alaska's Fort Apocalypse
programme.desc: In Alaska, the ruins of a massive compound point to eerie evidence of an apocalyptic mystery. New discoveries reveal why this strange marvel was built in the snowy wilds of the Last Frontier and why it was abandoned.

programme.desc: Two cosmonauts are trapped inside a capsule in a frozen lake; a NASA scientist investigates the deadly Nazi secret that doomed the Hindenburg; a full moon affects NASA experiments.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: A President's Close Encounter
programme.desc: Geysers are discovered on a frozen moon, and NASA redirects a probe on a daring mission to detect evidence of life. An unidentified object is spotted approaching a near-earth asteroid. A future US President is an eyewitness to a UFO.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: JFK UFO Conspiracy
programme.desc: A declassified letter written by President Kennedy demands that the CIA share its UFO data with NASA. A bizarre pattern on the surface of Mars could be a coded alien message. Investigators are shocked to find a rocket crash-landed in a crater on the Moon.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Pluto Under Pressure
programme.desc: Lost tapes reveal that Apollo astronauts heard unexplained transmissions on the far side of the moon, an amateur astronomer spots a strange disturbance in Martian atmosphere and an unidentified object in Earth orbit starts stalking Russian spacecraft.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: The Doomsday Castle
programme.desc: An abandoned eerie structure in France could have doomed the Allies in World War II, and new discoveries at this mysterious site reveal the truth behind top-secret Nazi plans to unleash apocalyptic destruction.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Mystery of the Nazi Nukes
programme.desc: When a secret bunker and a vast network of tunnels are discovered after World War II, experts use cutting-edge tech to uncover if the high levels of radiation in the area could be connected to a classified Nazi nuclear program.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Hitler's Invisible City
programme.desc: As the Soviet Army pushes the Nazis out of Poland, they discover a massive city of over a thousand buildings that was unknown to the Allies, and using the latest science, experts reveal how Hitler was able to keep this sinister place hidden for so long.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: The Devil's Lair
programme.desc: When a top-secret Nazi base is discovered in France decades after the war ends, experts use cutting-edge tech to reveal the secrets of this deadly compound; what they find could change everything we know about D-Day and the last stand of the Nazi regime.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Hitler's Forbidden Island
programme.desc: New discoveries on a strange fortified island reveal the terrifying truth behind Hitler's secret plan to win World War II at all costs, and using the latest science and tech, experts investigate what really happened here.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Secrets of the Vatican
programme.desc: The Vatican Archives hold the personal documents of past Popes, including pieces such as Galileo's trial transcript and King Henry VIII's annulment request. What else is hidden in the Vatican Library a place that is out of bounds even to Cardinals?

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Real Mary Magdalene

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Treasure of Solomon
programme.desc: The High Priests of the Temple in Jerusalem could have hidden their most sacred items before the city was sacked by the Romans and the Dead Sea Scrolls could actually be a treasure map to these hidden wonders. See what else lies under this ancient city.

programme.desc: An inmate with a shank sticking out of his stomach is rushed to the infirmary. Before losing consciousness, he gives the agents a lead on the case.

programme.desc: A mother and nursing student stops her anxiety medication abruptly, causing her to become delusional. After breaking into a home and stealing a car, she leads police on a high-speed pursuit.

programme.desc: Never-before-seen home movies reveal the fabulous lifestyle of Lanny and Donna Horwitz raising their only son Radley in their Florida mansion. But when their lives are upended by a ghastly shooting, everyone in this eccentric family becomes a suspect.

programme.title: American Monster: Stand by your Men

programme.title: A Killer Clown Strikes

programme.title: Home Sweet Homicide: In Cold Blood
programme.desc: When police discover Betty Sue Short murdered in her home, they notice disturbing similarities with another recent killing in the community of Kingsport, Tennessee.

programme.title: A Horror in October
programme.desc: Teenagers Todd Schultz and Annette Cooper go out for a walk one day and never return. When their body parts turn up in the Hocking River ten days later, it shocks their small-town community. But it will take nearly 25 years to learn the truth.

programme.title: Dark Minds: The Original Night Stalker

programme.desc: Wife and mother Sandra Duyst appears to have it all. Yet what few know is that Sandra struggles with crippling depression. Her death appears as a suicide, but a message from beyond the grave sends the investigation into a strange and unexpected direction.

programme.title: Grave Secrets: Baptism by Fire

programme.title: Grave Secrets: Her Mother's Prayers

programme.title: 48 Hours: Janet's Secret

programme.title: 48 Hours: Mommy Dearest
programme.desc: A Palm Beach socialite kills her husband, and then 20 years later, the same gun is used in another shooting in the family.

programme.title: 48 Hours: A Vision of Murder
programme.desc: A mother of two claims she saw the murder of a friend in her dreams. In fact the dream was a reality and her friend was later found bludgeoned to death in Central Florida.

programme.title: Primal Instinct: Old Flames Die Hard
programme.desc: Sharmon Intili believes she's met the man of her dreams. Her friends think otherwise. A messy breakup and the rekindling of an old flame puts into play a calculated plan to wipe out the competition.

programme.title: Primal Instinct: Strings Attached
programme.desc: Sparks fly when Chuck Rock meets Beth Williams in Tampa, Florida. When the relationship turns sour, Chuck finds himself drawn into a puzzling web of intrigue and danger and becomes the target of a mysterious stranger.

programme.title: Primal Instinct: Catfish Killer
programme.desc: In a small Tennessee town, Jenelle Potter has few friends. When her attraction to one of them isn't mutual, she is ostracized and feels threatened. Then a shadowy figure guides her family into a dark plot with a twisted ending no one saw coming.

programme.title: Primal Instinct: Evil Eye
programme.desc: Not long after Patrick Brown falls for a woman named Cece, he is plagued by mysterious phone calls and a creepy sense that someone is watching him. He begins to wonder if it might be a figment of his imagination.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: The Olympic Creep
programme.desc: When Olympic gold medallist Sheila Taormina agrees to help wannabe triathlete James Ludham, she doesn't know he wants more than just coaching. His dark fantasies take over her life until she has no other choice but to face him, and her fears, head on.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Pearl Harbor was a day that changed American history and life forever. But was the attack really a surprise? What did FDR know about the attack beforehand? An investigation into who really fired the first shots of the Pacific War?

programme.title: How the World Ends: Alien Invasion
programme.desc: With the recent discovery of thousands of earth-like planets in the universe the search for intelligent alien life continues. Some astronomers warn, when we find it, we should be prepared for advanced hostile extra-terrestrial species capable of anything.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: The UFO Cover-Up
programme.desc: Discover the truth behind the UFO cover up. Attempt to discover if there is a hidden 'shadow government' that guards the truth, even from the President.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Deep Sea Encounters
programme.desc: After decades of UFO research focusing on the skies, Unidentified Submergible Objects may be the next frontier of study. Newly declassified documents and first-hand accounts are leading researchers to believe that UFOs may be closer than we ever thought.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Pilots and Astronauts
programme.desc: Through amazing first-hand accounts from pilots and astronauts, we'll learn that sightings of mysterious, unknown objects in our skies are far more common than we're lead to believe.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Area 52
programme.desc: There are mysterious reports coming out of Area 52, including vanishing aircraft, UFOs, and revere engineering of highly advanced technology that have convinced investigators that the military knows more about alien visitation than they will say.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: UFO Deathbed Confessions
programme.desc: A look at the deathbed confessions that could provide real evidence of the existence of UFOs.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: Pilots and Astronauts
programme.desc: A look at first-hand accounts of mysterious, unknown objects in the skies from pilots and astronauts.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: Area 52
programme.desc: Few have ever heard about the ultra top-secret military base in the remote deserts of Utah known as Area 52.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: UFO Deathbed Confessions
programme.desc: A look at the deathbed confessions that could provide real evidence of the existence of UFOs.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: The UFO Cover-Up

programme.title: Air Aces: Wing Walker
programme.desc: The crew of Lancaster ME669 had one of the most dangerous jobs in the Air Force.

programme.title: Air Aces: George Beurling
programme.desc: Canadian George Beurling broke every rule in the book yet became one of the greatest fighter pilots of World War II.

programme.title: Air Aces: Douglas Bader
programme.desc: In July 1940, Britain's most celebrated air ace, Douglas Bader, and his ragtag squadron of Canadian fighter pilots, went into battle against Hitler's mighty Luftwaffe.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: In 1941, Hitler has thrown himself into a fight to the death against Stalin. Two decades earlier, in 1917, Joseph Jughashvili from Georgia is a member of Lenin's Bolshevik Party, who has just seized power in Russia. The country is torn by civil war.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: After blocking the Germans right outside of Moscow, Stalin now faces Hitler's second assault. The world's fate will be decided in Stalingrad. Like in Leningrad, men, women, and children are plunged into hell and sacrificed.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: The Soviets continue on the path to towards liberation. On the road to Berlin, they discover the horror of Hitler's extermination camps. Fifteen years earlier, Stalin transformed his country using every means at his disposal.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Tom Smith: The Two-Fisted Marshal of Abeline
programme.desc: Using his fists instead of a pistol, professional boxer turned frontier lawman Tom Smith is determined to clean up 'Hell on Earth.' This is the little known story of one of the greatest lawmen of the Wild West.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Tom Tunney and the Spies of N.Y.
programme.desc: While the First World War rages on in Europe, a German terrorist cell is waging its own secret war on American soil. When a New York City cop uncovers the plot, he must fight to save his country before it's too late.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Melvin Purvis: The Gangbuster
programme.desc: During the Great Depression, a violent crime wave is sweeping the nation. It was up to the FBI's Melvin Purvis to lead a massive manhunt for the most dangerous men in America.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Jelly Bryce: The Perfect Shot
programme.desc: With outlaws firing machine guns in the streets of Oklahoma City, sharp-shooting legend Delf 'Jelly' Bryce is on a collision course with some of the most violent men in America.

programme.title: Spies Declassified: Escaping the Kill Room
programme.desc: KGB Colonel turned Double Agent Oleg Gordievsky has spent ten years spying for Britain's secret service, MI6. Now the Soviets are on to him. His only hope for survival is to attempt a daring exfiltration plan.

programme.desc: Brett thinks he finally gets an easy restoration job on a stunning Spanish Colonial hillside mansion until he finds out it has a pink Victorian kitchen. Then he uncovers hidden treasure on the old woodwork but the homeowners don't share his excitement.

programme.title: Restored: The Riverside Transitional Craftsman Bungalow
programme.desc: Brett restores a Craftsman bungalow for a woman who had started the project with her late husband, but never finished. The homeowner is overwhelmed when she sees the house finally returned to its original beauty.

programme.title: Restored: The 1890 Yellow Shingle-Style Victorian
programme.desc: Brett strips away strange remodels and restores the beauty and functionality to a 1890s Victorian.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: 4th Street House

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: One Good Deed Deserves Another
programme.desc: A woman who lost her husband, the neighborhood 'Good Samaritan,' needs help completing many of the DIY projects he had started around the house. So Next Generation is stepping in, and stepping up, to 'Make Things Right' for the widow.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: Hiding in Plain Sight
programme.desc: A single homeowner is too proud to ask for help with the maintenance issues and repairs that come with living in an older home. When neighbors begin complaining, Next Generation steps in to help her improve the curb appeal and remove the backyard pool.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: Far From Home
programme.desc: A couple relocating to a different part of the city needs help updating their kitchen before putting their house on the market. After a local contractor let them down and drained their budget, Next Generation swoops in to 'make things right.'

programme.title: Vintage Rehab: 1920s Fixer-Upper Gets a Chic Kitchen and Bedroom Renovation
programme.desc: After purchasing a fixer-upper that turned out to be more than she could handle, a new homeowner calls on Ally to help update her kitchen and bedroom to match her style.

programme.title: Vintage Rehab: French Country Revival
programme.desc: A couple calls on Ally to help them celebrate their 25th wedding anniversary by renovating their beloved home. When she starts ripping out the 1920's farmhouse's walls she finds several surprises that slow her progress.

programme.title: Vintage Rehab: Colonial Meets Art Deco
programme.desc: After buying the vintage home of their dreams, a couple's plans of renovating fell by the wayside and they need help getting back on track. Ally's plans incorporate restored antique pieces while playing on the existing art deco accents.

programme.title: Vintage Rehab: Mid-century Masculine
programme.desc: A single father returns home from being deployed overseas hoping Ally can help him turn his ranch-style house into a family home for him and his two boys. Ally also reinvents the boys' bedrooms using reclaimed materials.

programme.title: Vintage Rehab: Craftsman Inside and Out
programme.desc: Newlyweds ask Ally to build them a Craftsman kitchen that matches the rest of their house. While she's at it, they've also asked her to turn their mud pit of a backyard into one that's fit for entertaining.

programme.title: Vintage Rehab: Scandinavian Style Makeover
programme.desc: Ally gets a call to update and expand a vintage farmhouse for a family of six, including a more functional master bathroom with a sauna, and a more spacious and modern kitchen. With her skills for repurposing, she might just be able to pull it off.

programme.title: Vintage Rehab: Neglected Craftsman Gets New Lease on Life
programme.desc: Chris and Aimee just bought a home that desperately needs help and Ally Mahon is up for the challenge. Ally is determined to take their fixer-upper and turn it into a beautiful new home for their growing family.

programme.title: Vintage Rehab: Victorian Upgrade
programme.desc: Ally helps a pair of homeowners upgrade their old Victorian home with a new front porch and a complete kitchen makeover. With a limited budget, Ally definitely has her work cut out for her, and the winter weather isn't doing her any favors either.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Hill Crest Bed and Breakfast
programme.desc: Mike, Robert, and the Black Dog Salvage crew extract a fireclay tub and window frame from a bed and breakfast. The crew also picks through a large auto graveyard. Key finds include a fire truck, a vintage cooler, and PBR sign.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Nehi Bottling Plant
programme.desc: Mike and the team salvage large industrial doors from the old Nehi Bottling Plant in Covington, VA.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Nelson House
programme.desc: The Black Dog Salvage crew saves pieces of a house in Mt. Jackson, VA. Their main focus is on the clay-fired roof and on the oversized cornice bracket.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Old Stagecoach Inn
programme.desc: Hosts Mike & Robert salvage a house previously damaged by a tornado near Abingdon, VA. Key items include floors, doors, and a complete staircase. While at the warehouse, Mike makes a commissioned desk for a child from a balance beam.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Reel Theatres
programme.desc: The crew salvages a movie theater, and find analog projectors, neon letters and more.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: St. Andrews Church Spires
programme.desc: The Dawgs help save copper elements from the St. Andrews Catholic Church spires in Roanoke, VA. The guys also bring in an expert to learn more about a large lithograph from a previous salvage.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: St. Mary's Rectory
programme.desc: The team finds cast-iron mantles, a built-in cabinet, and a stained glass front doorway.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Salvaging Items From an Apple Orchard into Repurposed Goods
programme.desc: The Black Dog Salvage crew head into the mountains to salvage different structures of an old apple orchard. Key finds include roof tin, apple picking ladders, and apple crates. Robert also helps Ted build a commissioned iron gate.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Roanoke College
programme.desc: The Black Dog Salvage team saves architectural elements at Roanoke College in Salem, VA. Key items include railings, brick pavers, gothic lighting, and a safe from the 1940s.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Weatherford Farmhouse
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs crew saves parts of a farmhouse in South Boston, VA. Key items include chairs, milk-painted paneling, and an arched window.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: American Viscose Plant
programme.desc: The Dawgs save a kiln from the American Viscose Plant in Roanoke, VA. Mike and Tay work together to build custom tables for a local optometrist office. Will Farmer also returns to appraise a map from 1853.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Bemis Cotton Mill
programme.desc: Mike, Robert and the rest of the team salvage the Bemis Cotton Mill in Jackson, TN. Key finds include fire doors, earthenware sinks, factory carts, and a gang sink. At the warehouse, Mike builds a bookshelf using the panels from a door.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship: The Candyman Cometh
programme.desc: The four remaining bakers make desserts to taste like their favorite candy bars and face death by chocolate with a dessert that combines chocolate with odd ingredients.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship: Extreme Halloween
programme.desc: The three remaining bakers create an edible centerpiece that glows, three creepy treats and a final challenge of Jack-O-Lantern cakes that light up. The winning baker takes home the title of 'Halloween Baking Champion' and $25,000.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Big Cheese
programme.desc: Jeff Mauro, Geoffrey Zakarian, Jamika Pessoa and Bobby Flay are just a few of your favorite food personalities sharing their all-time favourite ways to indulge in some cheesy goodness.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Feats Of Meat
programme.desc: Chefs share the most mouth-watering meat dishes they've ever eaten.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Saint Paul, MN
programme.desc: Casey's latest delicious detour brings him to Saint Paul for an indoor food truck park, a timeless diner and a terrible twosome of crepes and Thai rolled ice cream.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Ocean City, Maryland
programme.desc: Casey Webb heads to Ocean City, Maryland, to dive into a massive jumbo lump crab cake sandwich, make some of the area's iconic salt water taffy candies and fight to stay afloat in the Titanic Sundae Challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Palm Springs, CA
programme.desc: Casey Webb's cross-country culinary quest takes him back in time to Palm Springs, California, where he comes face-to-face with a three-pound skyscraper of a sandwich loaded with every deli meat imaginable.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Des Moines, IA
programme.desc: Casey heads to Des Moines, Iowa, where he'll attempt to eat an overstuffed pulled pork sandwich slathered in a scorpion pepper hot sauce in ten minutes.

programme.desc: SpongeBob tries to get into the Salty Spitoon; Squidward's old rival comes to town.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The New Leaf/ Once Bitten
programme.desc: In the battle for fast food supremacy, Plankton has decided to throw in the towel and start a new business selling trinkets and souvenirs; Gary starts biting everyone in town, and Squidward is convinced that he has a rare snail disease.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Dunces and Dragons/ Mermaid Man and Barnacle Boy VI: The Motion Picture
programme.desc: A freak jousting accident lands Bob and Pat in a medieval Bikini Bottom.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: 20,000 Patties Under the Sea/ The Battle of Bikini Bottom

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Hooky/ Mermaidman and Barnacleboy II
programme.desc: Patrick and SpongeBob ignore warnings; SpongeBob follows superheroes for a day.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Don't Look Now/ Séance Schméance
programme.desc: SpongeBob holds a séance at the Krusty Krab to learn the recipe for a long-lost sandwich. Then, SpongeBob and Patrick go to see the latest horror film, only to be seemingly stalked by the villain.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Krab Borg!
programme.desc: SpongeBob stays up late one night watching a sci-fi film where robots take over the world. He comes to work paranoid. Through a series of wild coincidences, SpongeBob gets it in his head that Mr. Krabs is a robot.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sleepy Time/ Suds
programme.desc: SpongeBob visits his friends' dreams; Bob musters the courage to visit the doctor.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Dying for Pie/ Imitation Krabs
programme.desc: Squidward lets Bob eat an exploding pie; Plankton disguises himself as Mr. Krabs.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sailor Mouth/ Artist Unknown
programme.desc: Bob learns a 'bad' word off of a dumpster; Bob is Squid's only student for an art class.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Yours, Mine and Mine/ Kracked Krabs
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick buy a toy and have to learn to share it.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sweet and Sour Squidward/ The Googly Artiste
programme.desc: Plankton tries to befriend Squidward so he can get the Krabby Patty formula. When an art critic deems Patrick a true artiste for his rocks-with-googly-eyes creations, everyone in Bikini Bottom clamours for a Patrick original.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Karen 2.0/ Inspongeiac

programme.title: Movie: The Scream Team

programme.title: Movie: Girl vs. Monster

programme.title: Amphibia: The Domino Effect / Taking Charge
programme.desc: Anne wants to keep a caterpillar as a pet, but she'll have to keep it a secret from Hop Pop; After one of the Plantars mysteriously runs out the charge on Anne's phone, the family embarks on a mission to try and recharge it.

programme.title: Amphibia: Cane Crazy / Flood, Sweat & Tears
programme.desc: When Anne breaks Hop Pop's favorite cane, she and her friends set out to replace it; After Anne's bedroom floods she has to share a room with Sprig.

programme.title: Amphibia: Hop Luck / Stakeout
programme.desc: To win a village cooking contest, Anne leads the family on a quest to make pizza; Sprig tricks Anne and Hop Pop into going on a stakeout in order to make them get along.

programme.title: Amphibia: Croak and Punishment/ Trip to the Archives
programme.desc: When Sprig's Blue Moon Shell is stolen, he and Anne investigate to find the crook. To prepare for Anne's quest, the Plantars go to the archives and accidentally get trapped!

programme.title: Amphibia: Snow Day/ Cracking Mrs. Croaker
programme.desc: When a winter cold snap freezes all the frogs in Wartwood, Anne must protect the townspeople. In an effort to make Mrs. Croaker like him, Sprig digs up a secret from her past.

programme.title: Amphibia: A Night at the Inn/ Wally and Anne
programme.desc: The Plantars stay at an inn for a night, but Polly discovers the caretakers aren’t what they seem. Everyone calls Anne crazy when she claims to have seen the Moss Man.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Big Bugball Game/ Combat Camp

programme.title: Movie: Hometown Christmas
programme.desc: A woman plans to save her town's nativity tradition when she returns to her small home town.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Til Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: A Chemist suddenly starts to suffer from foot pain, partial numbness, and hair loss. He was initially mis-diagnosed. Investigators started searching the lab he worked in and interrogated some co-workers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Core Evidence
programme.desc: When a 16-month-old baby dies, tests discover e. coli in her system. Eventually the bacteria are traced back to a fruit juice manufacturer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trail of a Killer
programme.desc: A community is shocked when police discover a woman raped and murdered in broad daylight on a public trail.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Gone Ballistic
programme.desc: When a middle-aged man is gunned down in his own home, the motive appears to be robbery, but a mysterious greeting card blows the investigation wide open.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Freeze Framed
programme.desc: An apparent suicide turns out to be a much more menacing scenario involving a black widow.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Touch of Evil
programme.desc: A dismembered body is dumped on the side of the New Jersey Turnpike and before police realize it, bodies are turning up between two states. A serial killer emerges, targeting Manhattan's gay community.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The List Murders
programme.desc: For 18 years, a man who murdered his entire family successfully eluded the FBI. Investigators used art and forensic science to find the killer and bring him to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Raw Terror
programme.desc: The story of Damion Heersink, an eleven-year-old boy who almost died after eating an improperly cooked hamburger teeming with E-Coli, and the people who saved his life.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer Fog
programme.desc: Investigators set out to determine if the dense, thick fog that caused the deadliest automobile accident on American history was a natural phenomenon, or the result of something else.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sex, Lies and DNA
programme.desc: While Earl Morris was vacationing in California, he learned his wife had gone missing from their home in Arizona. The search for Ruby Morris involved dozens of investigators and scientists, even the coast guard.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Bag of Evidence
programme.desc: When a 9-year old girl disappears, an anonymous caller leads police to her body.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dressed to Kill
programme.desc: When a six-year-old girl disappears without a trace, the parents become prime suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Clutch of Witnesses
programme.desc: Two eyewitnesses see a truck intentionally drive over a sleeping man outside a motorcycle gang's clubhouse. During the investigation the witnesses, the truck, and the body disappear, leaving police just one clue: a bloodstain in the snow.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Scout's Honor
programme.desc: Police determine that the human remains found in a discarded box belong to one Edna Posey. But to find out whether the man accused of the crime is guilty, investigators turn to insects and the forensic entomologist who can interpret their behavior.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Micro-Clues
programme.desc: When a boy is found dead in a cornfield, traces of water from his body help lead investigators to the boy's killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Parasites
programme.desc: In the spring of 1993, an unexplained illness struck the residents of Milwaukee, Wisconsin. Health officials suspected it was influenza, but it proved to be more serious and more difficult to identify.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Without a Trace
programme.desc: The deaths of a child and a truck driver in the same hospital on the same day are investigated to see if there is a link between them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Knot for Everyone
programme.desc: In the mid-1980s, bodies of nude woman were found in remote hills of California. The police got a break when a known prostitute escaped an attacker and was able to identify him and his automobile. The suspect was 50-year-old Roger Kibbe.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nursery Crimes
programme.desc: Medical investigators have no answers as to why children at a Texas hospital are dying at a higher rate than at any other hospital until they discover that one nurse seems to be on-duty in almost all the fatal cases.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Lasting Impressions
programme.desc: Examine intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Til Death Do Us Part

programme.title: Forensic Files: Where the Blood Drops
programme.desc: This is the story of a woman convicted of her husband's murder, whose son was so convinced of her innocence that he enrolled in law school.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pastoral Care
programme.desc: The body of a female prison guard shows up in a landfill and investigators suspect the hundreds of prisoners in the facility where she worked.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Shot in the Dark
programme.desc: A woman is found dead of a gunshot wound and police conclude that she was murdered by her husband. Forensic scientists were able to piece together the clues and determine what really happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen in Time
programme.desc: A young women went missing for three years until someone called to report a suspicious truck in a driveway. The cold trail turned even colder when they found out what was being stored in the truck.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bagging a Killer
programme.desc: Police use satellites to trace the kidnapper of a nine-year-old girl. After questioning whether the girl's long lost mother was somehow involved, the satellite tracking reveals who the kidnapper is, where they took her, and why.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Insulated Evidence
programme.desc: A young college student is found strangled and badly burned. Investigators get a break when a trace evidence expert uncovers the murder weapon in the spool of a vacuum.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Leave No Gold Behind

programme.title: Weather Underground
programme.desc: A breakdown of the science behind today's weather with fan interaction and frequent visits from guest meteorologists.

programme.title: Secrets of the Earth: Strange Skies
programme.desc: In 24-hour period thunderstorms, multiple suns, rainbows and night mirages change the Earth's sky.

programme.title: Secrets of the Earth: The Birth and Death of the Planet
programme.desc: Tracing the series of events that developed the Earth from its birth in the solar system to where the Earth could be billions of years ahead from now.

programme.title: Secrets of the Earth: Sinkholes
programme.desc: Sinkholes generate below the surface of the earth and will swallow anything above the surface. In North America, there are hundreds of thousands of sinkholes alone.

programme.title: Storm Stories: The Next Chapter: Arkansas Flash Flood
programme.desc: A flash flood at an Arkansas campsite flood leaves 20 dead, including 7 children.

programme.title: Storm Stories: The Next Chapter: Twin Twisters
programme.desc: Two powerful tornadoes take aim at a Nebraska farming community at the same time. Bank employees take cover in a vault, while a mother and her daughter are buried in the rubble.

programme.title: Storm Stories: The Next Chapter: The Music Plays On
programme.desc: Record-setting floods devastate Nashville, Tennessee while a woman is rescued by a neighbour on a Jet Ski just before her house goes up in flames.

programme.title: Water: The Ultimate Force
programme.desc: It's the most powerful and insidious force on the planet. How can something so vital be so dangerous? From hurricane storm surges to raging floods, we illustrate the science behind the power of water. Hear incredible stories of survival and flood safety.

programme.title: Oklahoma: Tornado Target
programme.desc: Why do so many large, violent tornadoes keep hitting Oklahoma? Correspondent Dave Malkoff travels the state in search of answers. Explore the science behind Tornado Alley, the heartbreak left behind and the future tech that can save lives in Oklahoma.

programme.title: The Truth About Twisters
programme.desc: Knowing tornado fact from fiction just might save your life. Whether handed down as folklore or spread by under-informed reports, misinformation about tornadoes has endured for centuries.

programme.title: FireStorm
programme.desc: All over the country, wildfires are getting bigger and the fire seasons are lasting longer. The changing climate and record heat are taking a toll. We take you into the fire storm with the men and women who sacrifice their lives to save yours.

programme.title: AMHQ Weekend

programme.title: Weekend Recharge

programme.title: So You Think You'd Survive?: Tornados and Killer Bees
