programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Mime and Punishment
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q put the nasty in namaste when they lead guided meditations. Tonight's big loser gets boxed in with a 24-hour punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Silence of the Lame
programme.desc: It's all play and no work when the guys square off in a toy-pitching competition. And tonight's big loser has to quiet down patrons in a food court.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Take Me Out at the Ballgame
programme.desc: The guys get drenched at a water park, and tonight's loser strikes out while jockeying for a ball from Mets pitcher Noah Syndergaard.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Party Crasher
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr dodge shakedowns with the help of some strangers, and tonight's loser has a run-in at a party that leaves him down for the count.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Marathon Man
programme.desc: The guys head to the Top of the Rock for some awkward interactions, and tonight's big loser suits up or down for a run across the Brooklyn Bridge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bull Shiatsu
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q try to hold it together as receptionists checking in some strange characters. Later, they offer up odd rewards to helpful strangers, and the big loser gets the stuffing squished out of him at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Needy and the Greedy
programme.desc: The guys have fast fingers at a focus group and leave no cereal box unturned at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser opens a can of something fierce at a local donation center.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Washed Up
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr rat each other out at a pizza place and get into textual relationships with strangers at the mall. Then, the big loser twerks hard for the money at an impromptu bikini car wash.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hump Day
programme.desc: The guys geek out while lending a hand to customers at a casual restaurant, then battle across the table of a focus group. Plus tonight's big loser gets spitting mad when forced to spend some quality time at the zoo.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q pull desk duty, and then do strangers a solid by barring them from the bathroom. Plus, the big loser learns the hard way that gratuity is not included.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Blue Man Dupe
programme.desc: Murr, Joe, Q and Sal are a little too generous with fellow shoppers at the market, then ask strangers to help them out of a texting jam. Plus, the big loser fights his way, repeatedly, to the best seat in the house.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Eggman
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr go incognito to fool unsuspecting strangers, then pop in for a coffee just in time to miss out on a big prize. Plus, tonight's big loser might just crack under the pressure of his rotten punishment.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: The Audit
programme.desc: With the crime rate lowered, Brooklyn will be shutting down one of its precincts permanently. The Nine-Nine is confident they will be evaluated fairly, until the official auditor turns out to be Amy's ex-boyfriend, Teddy.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: Serve and Protect
programme.desc: Terry's ex replaces Teddy in evaluating the precinct, but Jake and Rosa are distracted by a burglary case that occurred on the set of one of their favorite detective TV shows.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: The Last Ride
programme.desc: In what could be their last case as partners, Jake and Charles go to great extremes to apprehend a local bike thief. Terry shockingly isn't in the lead for 'Mr. Nine-Nine' (the detective who has solved the most cases), leaving Road to boost his ego.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: Moo Moo
programme.desc: Sergeant Jeffords is stopped by a fellow police officer while off-duty in his own neighbourhood. When the incident escalates, Terry wants to file an official complaint against him, but Captain Holt has other ideas.

programme.title: The Misery Index: He's Crushing His Man Cave Game
programme.desc: The Tenderloins witness the most embarrassing way to ruin a wedding.

programme.title: The Misery Index: Men of Intellect
programme.desc: Joe and Q become 'gentlemen', a little piggy goes to the emergency room, and a man rides the elevator from hell as a clumsy paramedic and accidental sexter battle to be masters of misery.

programme.title: The Misery Index: That Milk Must Have Turned by Now
programme.desc: Contestants guess the misery of some traumatic real-life events for the chance at $30,000.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: A New Hope
programme.desc: The crew is assigned its first-ever female firefighter, Lucy, sending the firehouse into a gender-confused tailspin. Then, when Chief clamps down on rookie hazing, the guys do it anyway only to find that Lucy is a force to be reckoned with.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: Training Day
programme.desc: The Tacoma FD's negligence during a firehouse school trip makes Councilwoman Price so angry that she orders the guys to complete a training recertification with an old nemesis who's just itching to fail them.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: The B-Team
programme.desc: Andy's big welcome from a different team of firefighters has him questioning his place within his own crew. Meanwhile, Eddie spars with a new top chef at the station to win the annual pancake cook-off.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Demo Crazy
programme.desc: Sara Schaefer knows what not to say in a search party, Joel Kim Booster explains why your grandpa doesn't trust him, and Yassir Lester knows all about Joel's longest relationship.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Made Me Laugh
programme.desc: Vanessa Fraction spots a 70's sitcom star in the crowd, Rojo Perez makes an inappropriate exit, and Tone Bell reads a crowd member's mind.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Where's the Bathroom?
programme.desc: Pete Lee reveals how millennials cure glaucoma, Michelle Buteau becomes a guidance counselor, and Matthew Broussard unmasks a German techno DJ in the crowd.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Russian Interference
programme.desc: Gina Yashere obsesses over the contents of a crowd member's pants, Joel Kim Booster knows exactly what not to say as a Pilates teacher, and Dave Hill tries a unique style of crowd work.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Wait, My Chair!
programme.desc: Michael shows a caterer the true power of dairy products, and an antique store customer is stunned when a species of termite chews through the scenery.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Speed Thieves
programme.desc: Michael adds spice to lunch at a diner, and at a furniture store, he shows his co-worker that impossible things can happen in the blink of an eye.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: A Similar Rock Energy
programme.desc: Michael is back in Chicago hashing out new ideas at a hemp store, inspecting spooky churches and teaming up with special guest star, Jack Black.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Total Face Rejuvenation
programme.desc: Michael shocks a receptionist with a medical procedure and later reveals a regenerating piece of gum. Plus, an electrifying trick rewrites history.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Relax the Back
programme.desc: Michael shocks people with every trick in the book, including a voice controlled page turner and outfit changes that almost get him recognized. And later, Michael amazes a trainee with a weightless mattress.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: The Snowball
programme.desc: At a ski shop, Michael demonstrates the latest in winter gear: a hat that also makes hot coco. And later, when taking inventory at an abandoned garage, Michael stuns his co-worker when a ghostly violin strikes a chord, all by itself.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Dr. Bones
programme.desc: Michael explores the true depth of a deep-dish pizza, and later, he plays doctor to a patient questioning his own vision and sanity. Plus, as a locksmith, Michael stuns his assistant with a surprise on the other side of the door.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: There's Life in Here
programme.desc: Michael gives a confused woman the license to speed at the DMV, unclogs a 'crumby' toaster at a return counter, and blows the mind of a beach attendant with a scaly encounter from under the sea.

programme.desc: Michael Carbonaro performs magic tricks on unsuspecting victims, all caught on camera.

programme.desc: Find out who keeps the tags on his jacket so he can return them, which crew member voices the 'sexy beast' commercial, and what chain restaurant the guys used during Sal's 'shush!' punishment at the mall.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Piling on the Pork
programme.desc: Guy is digging in and pigging out on this trip starting with a Puerto Rican spot in San Antonio that's building a unique take on nachos and cooking up a monster chop. In New Orleans, a gangster grill serves up pork knuckles and some sweet bird.

programme.desc: Guy Fieri and his son, Hunter, are taking a culinary journey up to Juneau, Alaska. They're divin' into everything from a family-run, wood-fired pizza wagon making reindeer pie to a funky basement spot mashin' up Latin-Asian fusion.

programme.desc: Guy Fieri dives into cultural cuisine with a twist! First, there's a cafe that's been serving scratch-made Scandinavian specialties in Salt Lake City since the 1950s. Next, there's a pizza joint putting an Indian spin on the classic Italian pie.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: A Taste Of Italy

programme.title: How Do Animals Do That?: Whale Songs and Cool Canines
programme.desc: In this episode, we take a look at how anteaters slurp up so many ants, why beaves build dams and how canines stay cool. Then, a look at why humpback whales sing and why dung beetles do what they do.

programme.title: How Do Animals Do That?: Super Sloths and Ostrich Marathons
programme.desc: In this episode, we take a look at how dogs detect underwater targets, what makes ostriches nature's best marathon runner and how sloths spend so much time upside down without passing out. Then, we find out how much a pelican bill can really hold.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: It's a Baby Giraffe!
programme.desc: It's all hands on deck in the Australia Zoo's Mammal Department as Rosie the Giraffe is ready to give birth. Robert has a bloody encounter with a wild python that's entered an enclosure, and Terri helps the keepers wrangle Chief the Tasmanian Devil.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Robert's Baby Kangaroo
programme.desc: While Bindi and the keepers ready Sophie the baby giraffe for her first steps into her enclosure, Robert helps to hand-raise another baby: Melman the kangaroo. Terri oversees a health check for one of the zoo's favourite characters, Ravi the red panda.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Big Day for Baby Rhino
programme.desc: Terri helps prepare the zoo's new baby rhino to receive a lifesaving vaccine. Robert is on a rescue mission to save two black swans in very bad shape. Bindi tries to determine if a cranky wombat named Poa might be pregnant.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: The Trials of Parenting
programme.desc: Baby flamingo Marley's mom has lost interest in mothering duties leaving dad, Rum, to rear the baby alone. Parenting duties are normally shared equally by flamingo parents, but Rum will have to do the work of two parents if his son is going to endure.

programme.title: The Zoo: Snow Monkey Social
programme.desc: A new bison calf has a hard time keeping up with his mom. The bird department prepares a group of Von der Decken hornbill chicks for their big move to the Minnesota Zoo. And keepers at the Central Park Zoo hope the female snow monkeys accept a new male.

programme.title: The Zoo: A Polar Bear in the City
programme.desc: The last polar bear in NYC is showing his age, so staff make sure he gets all the attention he needs. Also, a trio of red ruffed lemurs prepare for their debut and a new exhibit is constructed for the hellbender, a giant amphibian with a bad reputation.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: New Orleans, Here We Come
programme.desc: It's a whole new world for Tia, her family, the parolees, and most importantly, her pitbulls, when they pack up their lives and moves across country to New Orleans. But the move is only the first of many challenges Tia faces.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Face Off
programme.desc: Tia meets a family of eight looking to adopt a new dog after losing theirs to cancer. Then, a rescue-call takes Tia and her daughter Tania into New Orleans’s infamous ninth war to face off with a snarling, sick dog.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Ghost Dog
programme.desc: A pit bull is saved from drowning by a little girl and needs Tia's help. Also, 20 new puppies are brought to Villalobos and Tia needs to hire another parolee.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Second Savior
programme.desc: When a sinkhole threatens to swallow a nearby neighborhood, Tia teams up with cat expert Jackson Galaxy to rescue dozens of cats. And, after finding a neglected mama dog near the warehouse, Tia and her team span out to try and find her puppies.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: City of Second Chances
programme.desc: A mother and son travel from Boston with hopes of adopting a dog, but Tia struggles to find a good fit for the family. Lizzy rescues a maggot-covered dog that was found lying on the road and races to the vet, hoping to save her.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Raised in Rescue
programme.desc: Return adopters visit Villalobos to find a dog that will feel at home on their boat. Tania and Mariah head out to rescue a stray that is hiding beneath a shipping container. And parolee Jammall starts to slip up, risking his future at the rescue.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: A Family Affair
programme.desc: Mariah is devastated when she learns that a friend has passed away.

programme.title: Amanda to the Rescue: Floppy-Footed Pit Bull
programme.desc: Amanda takes on two new rescues: Flint Lockwood, a nine-month-old pit bull with a fractured jaw and Latte, a four-month-old Dalmatian with an eye condition that could lead to blindness. Both need immediate medical attention.

programme.title: Amanda to the Rescue: Professor Clovis and the Hamburglar

programme.title: Amanda to the Rescue: Aloha Dog Rescue
programme.desc: Amanda and her kids travel to Hawaii, where they meet dogs perfect for Panda Paws: a deaf mother-daughter Catahoula duo, Loco Moco, a puppy who may be blind and Super Scootie, a senior in need of a home after years of neglect.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Bosco the Croc's Big Move

programme.title: Movie: The Choice

programme.title: Movie: The Longest Ride
programme.desc: A college student about to begin her dream job in New York City falls in love with a former champion bull rider who's determined to make a comeback. Their love story intertwines with that of a 91-year-old man who's visited by the image of his dead wife.

programme.title: Movie: Hidden Figures
programme.desc: Three African-American women are hired by NASA to calculate launch and landings for the first astronaut to make a complete orbit around the Earth. Working in a segregated department, they fight racial barriers to make history in more than one way.

programme.title: Movie: The Heat
programme.desc: An ambitious FBI agent is sent to Boston to track down a drug lord. When she arrives, she is partnered with a loose cannon local cop who is not fond of her and is hell-bent on finding the criminal all on her own.

programme.title: Movie: Terminator 2: Judgment Day
programme.desc: A machine is sent back in time to protect a boy who will become the saviour of the world.

programme.title: Movie: Independence Day
programme.desc: When an alien species attacks the human race by destroying New York City, Los Angeles and Washington, the survivors, lead by the President of the United States, a scientist and an Air Force pilot, attempt to thwart future attacks on Earth.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Graham welcomes Jason Momoa, Emilia Clarke, Regina King, Ross Noble and Camila Cabello.

programme.title: Movie: Independence Day
programme.desc: When an alien species attacks the human race by destroying New York City, Los Angeles and Washington, the survivors, lead by the President of the United States, a scientist and an Air Force pilot, attempt to thwart future attacks on Earth.

programme.title: Movie: Terminator 2: Judgment Day
programme.desc: A machine is sent back in time to protect a boy who will become the saviour of the world.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Dynasties: Painted Wolf
programme.desc: The dynasty is threatened when a pained wolf matriarch feuds with her daughter.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Dynasties: Emperor Penguin
programme.desc: A colony of penguins try to keep themselves alive through the winter in Atka Bay.

programme.title: Frozen Planet: On Thin Ice
programme.desc: The melting ice is putting people and wildlife that live at the poles at risk.

programme.title: Frozen Planet: To the Ends of the Earth
programme.desc: The polar regions experience the planet's most extreme seasons and are home to some of its most surprising animal behaviours. Polar bears search and fight for mates, penguins surf and orcas hunt collaboratively.

programme.title: Frozen Planet: Spring
programme.desc: Spring arrives in the poles and the sun appears after many months of darkness, as do the adelie penguins. In the Antarctic, the sun seems welcoming but its return triggers fierce katabatic winds.

programme.title: Frozen Planet: Summer
programme.desc: The summertime is a time when the harshest environments on Earth temporarily become favourable for most. While the sun never sets, life speeds up for polar wildlife in a race to raise their young.

programme.title: Frozen Planet: Autumn
programme.desc: For the animals of the Polar Regions, time is running out in the autumn. The Arctic Ocean freezes over and the sea ice advances around Antarctica.

programme.title: Frozen Planet: Winter
programme.desc: There is no greater challenge for life than winter in the Polar Regions. As temperatures plummet to 70 degrees below zero Fahrenheit, witness the greatest test of survival on the planet.

programme.title: Frozen Planet: An Epic Journey
programme.desc: The very best highlights of the series, taking viewers on a spectacular journey through the entire polar year, from the depths of winter to the melting world of the polar summer.

programme.title: Planet Earth II: Cities
programme.desc: Rooted on the slope of a rocky hill in Namaqualand, South Africa stands The Namaqua Rock Fig Tree. with the ability to withstand the unforgiving conditions of the surrounding desolate landscape, and with minimal rainfall, it is a testament to survival.

programme.title: Planet Earth II: Islands
programme.desc: For some, remote islands offer sanctuary away from the mainland: the tiny pygmy three-toed sloth only survives because of the peace and safety offered by its Caribbean island home, while seabirds like albatross thrive in predator-free isolation.

programme.title: Hard Time: Locked Up: Prison Gangs
programme.desc: In prison, every day is a fight for survival. An inmates most important weapon may not be a shank or a razor, but instead a gang membership.

programme.title: Prison Nation
programme.desc: America has more prisoners behind bars than any other country on earth. It now has 25 percent of the world's incarcerated, with just five percent of the population; it's an entire nation behind bars. But today, that nation is in crisis.

programme.title: Russia's Toughest Prisons
programme.desc: For the first time, Russia opens one of its most guarded institutions to an international film crew: its prison system. Go inside a 200-year-old Russian prison and to another that is home to more than 700 of Russia's most dangerous killers.

programme.title: Lockdown: Inside a Mexican Prison
programme.desc: Nuevo Laredo, Mexico, is just a few miles from the American border and is a major thoroughfare for drug smuggling. That is where you will find the notorious CEDES prison. We go inside to see how a new administration is trying to clean it up.

programme.title: Lockdown: Shanks and Shakedowns
programme.desc: Nearly everyone arrested on felony charges in Cleveland must await trial in Cuyahoga County Jail. We take you on an in-depth look at the facility and it's Special Response Team working against gangs who prey on other inmates.

programme.title: Breakout: Through the Wall
programme.desc: Using ingenuity and improvised tools, wily and determined prisoners attempt to bust out.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Treasure of Outlaw Valley
programme.desc: Searching for a Gold Rush ghost town's legendary hidden treasure in the hills surrounding the town.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: City of the Damned
programme.desc: A deserted town in Spain with a bloody past and a ghost fleet heading nowhere are homes to dark secrets.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: World's Strangest Ghost Towns
programme.desc: The world's strangest ghost towns are home to dark secrets, creepy buildings, and eerie sights, and new discoveries reveal why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: American Atlantis
programme.desc: An abandoned town in the Nevada desert are the ruins of an American Atlantis, destroyed by catastrophic floods when the Hoover Dam was built. Today, experts investigate the secrets of this eerie ghost town as water levels recede and the city re-emerges.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Jungle of the Damned
programme.desc: At an infamous prison in the Amazon, the most dangerous criminals on earth faced hard labour, a hostile environment and death by guillotine. Today, it's deserted, and new discoveries reveal why this hellish compound was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Haunting of Heartbreak Castle
programme.desc: Experts investigate what was once a fairy-tale castle, but now is abandoned, and rumored to be haunted. They uncover secrets of the ancient fortress, and its ghostly stories.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Kingdom of the Vanished
programme.desc: A mysterious town in the hills of South Africa was once a booming community, but today, the eerie place is deserted. Experts reveal the cataclysm that caused the people of this once-prosperous town to suddenly leave and never come back.

programme.title: Unearthed: Ghosts of Stonehenge
programme.desc: Examine new discoveries which are revealing the deepest and darkest secrets of Stonehenge, showing how ancient magic, bizarre rituals, and brutal murder built this strange monument.

programme.title: Unearthed: Ghosts of the Stone Age
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal secrets and ritual of the people who build the world's largest stone circle.

programme.title: Unearthed: Summit of the Gods
programme.desc: Go inside the Acropolis, an ancient engineering marvel that has stood above the city of Athens for thousands of years. Follow the scientists working to reveal its hidden mysteries: how it was built, what it looked like, and why it's still standing today.

programme.title: Unearthed: Tut's Buried Secrets
programme.desc: New discoveries explore the dark secrets of Tutankhamun's tomb. Archaeologists are finally finding answers to its ancient riddles, showing how his untimely death, his calamitous burial, and an act of God made a minor king the most famous of them all.

programme.title: Unearthed: Mystery of Egypt's Mega Temple
programme.desc: The Egyptian mega-temple at Karnak was once the political powerbase of the ancient pharaohs and the home to strange religious rituals. New discoveries of skeletons tell a story of jealousy, betrayal, and the rise of a new religion that changed Egypt.

programme.title: Why I Ran: Kevin/ Jason
programme.desc: People who have lead the police on high-speed car chases share their experiences and stories. They also explain what was going through their heads while they were being pursued.

programme.title: Why I Ran: Justin/ Frank
programme.desc: A struggling father resorts to illegal means to make a living, leading him into a situation involving stolen property; a doting grandfather ends up on the wrong side of the law and flees after being pulled over

programme.desc: The trial of the century takes a shocking turn when the defense says Erik and Lyle Menendez killed their parents after years of sexual abuse. Erik tells his harrowing account of growing up in the Menendez 'house of horrors.'

programme.desc: Erik Menendez recalls his mother's decline in the years leading up to the murders and looks on in agony as his brother, Lyle testifies, vividly describing the abuse at the hands of their father.

programme.title: The Menendez Murders: Erik Tells All: Final Verdict

programme.desc: The body of a young woman is found in a California brush fire. In the ensuing investigation, detectives uncover a twisted murder plot put in motion by an unthinkable mastermind.

programme.title: The Last 24: Real Pet Cemetery
programme.desc: Amid rumors of buried treasure at a Louisiana pet cemetery, the property's reclusive owner is found wrapped in heavy chains at the bottom of a river. Somebody wanted her to disappear, but it will take over 20 years before police can find her killer.

programme.title: The Last 24: Target of Hate
programme.desc: When a nursing student is shot dead outside a Houston community college, the search is on for a brazen shooter in a red car. Detectives retrace the last 24 hours of the victim's life, and unearth a number of potential suspects.

programme.title: Dateline: The Trouble in Quitman
programme.desc: When police find a mother and her son shot to death in their home in a small town in Texas, questions arise over whether the husband may have been behind the deaths.

programme.title: Dateline: Indiscretion
programme.desc: A young woman is found brutally murdered in her Baltimore home. Police find themselves stumped for over a decade, until a DNA breakthrough leads to a surprising suspect.

programme.title: Dateline: The Informant
programme.desc: A young woman’s chilling story about a girl’s abduction and murder helps re-open a case that has haunted a New York town for decades.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: A Thin Blue Line
programme.desc: Sheriff deputies with a perfect marriage reveal a shocking tale of good cop/ bad cop that can only end in a fugitive on the run.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Bored to Death
programme.desc: When Opal Skidmore marries Steven Williams, their love is a second chance for the pair to live out their dreams. Until boredom and the lure of the open road spark hidden desires and sexual hijinks leaving this open marriage anything but happy.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: The Ties That Bind
programme.desc: A teenage romance gets caught in family ties.

programme.title: The Lies that Bind: Cult of Personality
programme.desc: In 2014 a 911 call reports gunshots at the home of TV host Scott Rogers. As detectives work to piece together the events that led up to what looks like a murder-suicide, they soon discover a trail of lies from England all the way to Louisiana.

programme.title: The Lies that Bind: Before Vegas
programme.desc: August 7, 2000, Casey Tiner and her boyfriend TJ Steele disappear. At first, people believe they ran away. But as time passes and the young couple never reappear, their families and the police realize someone is lying.

programme.title: The Lies that Bind: She Was Gone
programme.desc: Three months after high school sweethearts, Lisa and Jimmy Moore, end their marriage, Lisa disappears. Fearing the worst, her family file a missing person report, but the police have no leads, no witnesses, but they do know that someone is lying.

programme.title: The Lies that Bind: Ex's and Alibis
programme.desc: On December 3, 200, Louisiana Melton and her boyfriend Phillip Brown are found shot dead. Detective Harris of the Houston Police Department has little evidence from the crime scene, a large list of potential suspects, and one huge lie.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Domestic Disturbance
programme.desc: With a new home and loving fiancé, single mom Lisa Filiaggi finally feels like luck is on her side. That is until troubles from her past come back to haunt her and threaten to destroy all her future plans.

programme.title: Spies Declassified: The Honey Trap
programme.desc: Martha Peterson is a CIA secret weapon, operating as a woman in the man's world of espionage in Cold War Moscow. TRIGON is a KGB turncoat; ready to hand over top secret intelligence to bring down the Soviet Union from within.

programme.title: Spies Declassified: Reagan's KGB Agent
programme.desc: Vladimir Vetrov was a top KGB spy until he betrayed his country and became a secret agent for the West. Codenamed 'Farewell,' he would become America's single greatest asset in the US-Soviet Spy war.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Work on a Crab Boat
programme.desc: Kenneth 'Speedy' Raulerson is wanted in Florida for armed robbery. He flees to Alaska to work the crab boats. After six months, he returns to the backwoods of Florida. Raulerson knows he will eventually be caught and is prepared to go down fighting.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Pose as a War Vet
programme.desc: Posing as a veteran and preying on women to get cash, cars, and even a house, Jerrod Durr finds himself in a multistate game of cat and mouse with cops.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Video Rental Store
programme.desc: In 1975, Michael Brown killed Richard Sullivan during a robbery. Brown was convicted, and while in prison married a woman named Donna. He soon escaped so they could start a new life together. They lived for more than 15 years without incident.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Caught in the Shower
programme.desc: Richard Garber thinks he has gotten away with murder, after he bludgeons a neighbour to death. But when he becomes the lead suspect in the case, Garber hits the road spending eight months dodging the Feds and sneaking cash from his girlfriend.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Lock and Load
programme.desc: A Texas separatist group takes two hostages. Rangers are able to negotiate the release, however two members, Richard Keyes and Mike Matson get away, evading helicopters and dogs. Using an underground militia group, Keyes hides out in the woods undetected.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Video Rental Store
programme.desc: In 1975, Michael Brown killed Richard Sullivan during a robbery. Brown was convicted, and while in prison married a woman named Donna. He soon escaped so they could start a new life together. They lived for more than 15 years without incident.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Caught in the Shower
programme.desc: Richard Garber thinks he has gotten away with murder, after he bludgeons a neighbour to death. But when he becomes the lead suspect in the case, Garber hits the road spending eight months dodging the Feds and sneaking cash from his girlfriend.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Work on a Crab Boat
programme.desc: Kenneth 'Speedy' Raulerson is wanted in Florida for armed robbery. He flees to Alaska to work the crab boats. After six months, he returns to the backwoods of Florida. Raulerson knows he will eventually be caught and is prepared to go down fighting.

programme.title: Spies Declassified: Reagan's KGB Agent
programme.desc: Vladimir Vetrov was a top KGB spy until he betrayed his country and became a secret agent for the West. Codenamed 'Farewell,' he would become America's single greatest asset in the US-Soviet Spy war.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Joe Valachi
programme.desc: The story of hitman Joe Valachi, the first Mafia member to break the code of silence and turn public informer.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: The Mafia's Banker
programme.desc: A close associate of longtime Teamsters President Jimmy Hoffa and associated with the Chicago Outfit, Alan Dorfman embezzled millions for the mob and himself until he was violently murdered in 1983.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Donnie Brasco
programme.desc: Former FBI agent Joe Pistone, who infiltrated the Mafia for six years as Donnie Brasco, reveals how his undercover work led to more than 100 convictions - and resulted in the death of underworld figure Dominick 'Sonny Black' Napolitano.

programme.title: The Real Don of New York
programme.desc: Under the disguise of mental illness, Vincent Gigante evaded the authorities and rose to become the most powerful mobster in New York. When FBI realised their mistake, they would stop at nothing to take him down.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: Yukon Gold Rush War
programme.desc: This epic Gold Rush showdown pits legendary conman Jefferson 'Soapy' Smith and his loyal 'Soap Gang' against town organizer-turned vigilante Frank Reid and the Committee of 101, in a battle to bring justice to the lawless Alaskan Frontier.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: Gangs of New York
programme.desc: This notorious feud is one of the largest street wars in history. William Poole ('Bill the Butcher') rules New York's viciously anti-immigrant nativist gang, but the Bowery Boys challenge their hold.

programme.title: Hatfields vs. McCoys
programme.desc: The Hatfields feud with the McCoys is one of the most notorious feuds in American history. What starts as Civil War hostility rapidly escalates to kidnapping, illicit love affairs, murder and a nation-wide turf war.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: The Devil Incarnate
programme.desc: Born in Honduras, Juan Ramon Matta Ballesteros became one of the richest cocaine smugglers in history. Ballesteros masterminded a supply route into the US, which fed much of the cocaine and crack epidemic of the 70's and 80's.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: The Black Widow
programme.desc: A cocaine empire triggers a tidal wave of deaths across the United States. Behind this rampage is a bloodthirsty female psychopath who kills for fun. Known as The Black Widow, this is the true story of Griselda Blanco and how she's brought to justice.

programme.title: Alcatraz: Beyond the Rock
programme.desc: The world's most famous prison holds many secrets. We'll explore a conspiracy that helped three inmates escape, reveal the truth behind the dungeon of Alcatraz, and discover the remnants of a mysterious military outpost with links to Abraham Lincoln.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Cast Iron Storefront
programme.desc: Mike, Robert and the rest of the team salvage a cast iron storefront in Vicksburg, MS. Mike and Tay also work together to build a custom table for country music duo Thompson Square.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Clapp Farm Windmill
programme.desc: Mike, Robert and the rest of the team salvage an Aeromotor windmill in Liberty, North Carolina. They also pick through various barns on the property. Back in the woodshop, Mike uses salvaged barn wood and iron to build a floor lamp.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Elks National Home
programme.desc: The Dawgs head to the Elks National Home in Bedford, VA, to salvage parts of the old lodge. Back in the woodshop, Mike builds a swing from a salvaged apple crate and upholsters cushions from old postal bags.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Salvaging Items From an Old Navy Ship in Norfolk, VA, Into Repurposed Goods
programme.desc: Mike, Robert, and the Black Dog Salvage crew salvage parts off a former navy ship, the USS Zuni/ USCG Tamaroa. Key finds include an officer's table, portholes, and wooden ship frames. At the warehouse, Mike builds a table from an airplane wing.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Salvaging Items From Columbus, Ohio Into Repurposed Goods
programme.desc: The guys tackle disassembling a 40 foot Eiffel Tower replica in Columbus. While there, they meet a fellow salvager and pick through his collection. Grayson also builds a floor lamp with salvaged materials back at the warehouse.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Salvaging Items in Boardman, Oh, into Repurposed Goods
programme.desc: Mike builds a bed frame from horse jump poles; the crew brings in an expert.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Gary's Girls' Tiny Farmhouse vs. The Boys' Tiny Lodge
programme.desc: Gary's Girls strip a lakeside house down and build two tiny houses with the help of their husbands. The ladies come up with an innovative build that has a modern farmhouse design while the guys create a tiny lodge.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: The Snow Sisters' French Farmhouse
programme.desc: The Snow Sisters win a large home at an auction in The Colony, Texas, and have to move it in two pieces.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Randy's Upscale Country vs. Paige and Raf's Snag
programme.desc: Randy wins big at auction, but Paige and Raf hit a snag. After the city informs Paige and Raf that they aren't able to move the house they won, they brush it off and set out for more auctions. Meanwhile, Randy gets busy with his large renovation.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: The Hayhurst Brothers' Modern Rustic Mansion
programme.desc: The Hayhurst brothers win a large maze of a home at an auction in Kennedale, Texas. It has to be cut up to move it, so they lose part of the house and most of the roof, but they make up for it by building a large addition.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: The Snow Sisters' French Farmhouse
programme.desc: The Snow Sisters win a large home at an auction in The Colony, Texas, and have to move it in two pieces.

programme.title: Amazing Space: A Garage Becomes a Bathroom
programme.desc: Eric travels to Norwalk to help homeowners expand their house. The couple loves the location in a town known for its tourist attractions and beaches but their single-story ranch home has cramped bathrooms and closets.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Sunrise Day Camp Clubhouse
programme.desc: Pete constructs an amazing clubhouse for Sunrise Day Camp: a summer camp for kids battling cancer. This open-air treehouse grants campers full interaction with nature by erasing the line between indoors and out.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Adventure Headquarters
programme.desc: Pete and the NTS gang embark on an epic quest to give a thrill-seeking couple the treehouse of their dreams. This house will be an adventure headquarters in the sky, sitting 16 feet high with a wraparound deck that provides 360 degrees of stunning views.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Mindbending Silver Maple
programme.desc: Inspired by tales of a time long past, Pete builds a treehouse cradled by the stems of a twisty silver maple on the shore of Lake Chelan. The cedar-shingled structure has a curved turret that soars two storeys high and a deck to take in views of the lake.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Ultimate Treehouses IV
programme.desc: Join Pete Nelson on a journey to explore ingenious treehouse designs and engineering feats of builders the world over. At the end of his adventure, Pete embarks on his very own epic treehouse engineering repair.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Nelson Family Treehouse
programme.desc: Pete gifts his daughter Emily, and Patrick, her boyfriend and an NTS carpenter, with the ultimate housewarming gift - a treehouse of their very own - by turning a piece of Nelson family history into a Moroccan marvel nested nearly 35 feet off the ground.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: New Project, New Headache
programme.desc: When a hundred-year-old Victorian home that Nicole wants to renovate sells to other buyers, she convinces them to let her be involved as they work to get it back on the market.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Bathroom Redux
programme.desc: With the exterior of the Harriet Project completely restored, Nicole and the guys move inside and begin demolition to prepare for pluming and electrical work.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Kitchen Conundrums
programme.desc: Nicole searches for a set of salvaged cabinets to use in the Harriet Project's upper unit kitchen. With her own house still up for sale, Nicole visits the historical society to see if she can discover any new information about the property.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Living Room Revamp
programme.desc: Nicole repairs the hardwood floors in both living rooms of the Harriet Project and searches for replica tile to begin restoring a fireplace in the downstairs unit.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: The Finished Project
programme.desc: With only a few weeks left to finish the Harriet Project, Nicole and the homeowners divide and conquer to complete the lower unit's living room and kitchen. Nicole visits a local high school shop class to work on a radiator cover for the living room.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Kitschy Kitchen
programme.desc: Nicole tackles her grandparents' kitchen. Built in 1956, the kitchen has been around for over half a century, but was redone in the '90s, eliminating its mid-century modern charm. Nicole wants to restore the kitchen to how it looked when she was a child.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: The Basement Reborn
programme.desc: After an improperly winterized basement bathroom springs some serious leaks, Nicole remains determined to rebuild the bathroom better than ever. She also adds an egress window to the basement and builds out a basement guest suite.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Red Barn Reborn
programme.desc: Nicole takes on her most personal project yet, her grandfather's red barn. The barn has fallen into disrepair and requires a great deal of structural work to make it safe and strong.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Moving Up in the World
programme.desc: Cracks in the foundation put a dent in MJ's hot tub dreams, while Mike tries to keep the focus on structure as the second floor walls go up. MJ decides not to tarp the house before a heavy rain, dampening both Mike's mood and the wood beneath his feet.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Derby Dolls
programme.desc: Four bakers try to elbow past the competition for a chance to bring their cupcakes to a party celebrating the Los Angeles Derby Dolls.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Tree People
programme.desc: Four cupcake bakers compete to have their creations featured at the Tree Peoples' Harvest Moon Gala for environmental conservation.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: Holiday Party Delights
programme.desc: Nine bakers must create a dessert with an unusual candy cane flavor then use a holiday cocktail as inspiration for the main heat. One baker is sent home.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: Season of Sharing
programme.desc: In the pre-heat, eight bakers team up to make a dozen hand pies in a festive holiday shapes. For the main heat, bakers create a dessert duo inspired by classic holiday flavor combinations.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: Thanksgiving Genius
programme.desc: In the pre-heat, seven bakers must create a Thanksgiving dessert using a mystery canned fruit. Then in the main heat, bakers whip up new Turkey Day sensations by combining two traditional desserts.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: A New Holiday Spin
programme.desc: The six remaining bakers use yellow cake mix to make anything but cake inspired by a meme and then must 'holiday up' a non-holiday dessert.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Sea Creatures and Corvette Cakes
programme.desc: Young buccaneers on an Old World pirate ship are treated to a cake filled with treasure, and a group of car connoisseurs enjoys a replica cake that's ready to roll.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Fierce, Festive Cakes
programme.desc: One baker is excited to create a massive shark cake to celebrate Discovery's Shark Week, and a bride and groom are floored when their gorgeous wedding cake spins.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Rise and Dine
programme.desc: Rise and Dine with Unwrapped 2.0 and find out how the light and airy French donut gets its fancy twist, as well as how sprouted wheat turns into a hearty, tasty cinnamon raisin bagel.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Melting Pot
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro serves up a made-in-the-USA, multicultural menu. A family-run Philadelphia factory for the secrets of an authentic Italian cannoli.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Global Goodies
programme.desc: The world gets a little smaller when host Alfonso Ribeiro shares the secrets behind globally-inspired goodies. See how Jarlsberg cheese gets its holes and why the Idaho Candy Company made a confection shaped like a potato.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Snack Bar
programme.desc: Alfonso explores some snack bar treats, starting with cool and refreshing Junior Mints and their signature dimple. For dessert on the go, find out about Nemo's carrot cake squares and Tasty Kate's individual cherry pies.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: It's A Rainbow
programme.desc: It's a kaleidoscope of color as Alfonso Ribeiro finds out how RW Garcia make their tortilla chips so vibrantly red. Then it's off to Amy's Kitchen for their multicolored, palate-pleasing Thai Red Curry Bowl.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Simple Goodness
programme.desc: Alfonso covers all things easy from snacks that evoke childhood memories like iconic Hostess Twinkies and the colorful Jel Sert Otter Pops to easy dinner solutions like Bertolli's Chicken Parmigiana and Penne.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Surf And Turf
programme.desc: Roger Mooking checks out the best surf-and-turf dishes in restaurants across America. He joins chefs to learn how to put amazing combinations together including the classic lobster tail and steak, clam and bacon pizza, and more.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Fried
programme.desc: From seafood and beef to pork and cheese, all the best foods taste better fried and Roger Mooking is scouring the country in search of the 12 best fried-food dishes. He's hanging out with fried-food-loving chefs learning all their secrets.

programme.title: Food Truck Nation: Tacos, Drumsticks and Stuffed Waffles
programme.desc: Brad Miller starts off in Nashville, where chef Danny Bua is packing unique flavour combinations into soft tortilla tacos on That Awesome Taco Truck. Brad tries the '80s throwback taco with a cheese quesadilla base as well as a lobster roll taco.

programme.title: Food Truck Nation: Burritos, Kabobs and S'Mores
programme.desc: In St. Louis, Brad Miller visits the Seoul Taco truck, where Chef David Choi is serving up a unique spin on Mexican food by infusing it with the flavours of Korea. Brad samples a gogi bowl and the popular Korean barbecue burrito with kimchi rice.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Bon Appetit
programme.desc: Michael McKean is all berets and baguettes as he digs into a few of France's most fantastic feasts. He crosses the pond to see if crepes could nearly kill a king.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: My Kind Of Town
programme.desc: Michael McKean is taking us on a wild ride through the Windy City. He's going to determine if Chicago deep dish is definitely pizza, if brownies are just fancy fair food and he'll shed some light on saganaki's flames.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Deli-licious
programme.desc: Host Michael McKean is ready to fill our bellies with delicious dishes from the deli. He's checking out how the bagel met cream cheese and lox, why black and white cookies keep the gray away and when pastrami on rye first piled things high.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Layers of Flavours
programme.desc: Host Michael McKean layers it on thick as he digs into lovely layered feasts. He'll find out if club sandwiches were once for members only, how tiramisu tried to take coffee's job and why London may lay claim to lasagna.

programme.title: Good Eats: Tortillas Again
programme.desc: Chef/ Scientist Alton Brown shows his love for leftovers.

programme.title: Good Eats: House of the Rising Bun
programme.desc: Chef/ scientist Alton Brown whips up tasty breakfast breads.

programme.title: Good Eats: Let Them Eat Foam (Angel Food Cake)
programme.desc: Chocolate layer and sheet cakes are more American than apple pie, yet few of us ever bake them anymore. Shop for cake pans, and learn everything you need to know to keep your foam from flopping.

programme.title: Good Eats: Squash Court II
programme.desc: Alton Brown cooks with summer squash.

programme.title: Movie: Rambo
programme.desc: In Thailand, a group of Christian aid workers recruit John Rambo to guide them up the Salween River to deliver medical supplies to the Karen tribe of neighbouring Burma (aka Myanmar).

programme.desc: The Circus does a deep dive into the long-time federal government agencies and bureaucrats involved in Congress' ongoing impeachment inquiry, otherwise dubbed by President Trump as the 'deep state.'

programme.title: 100%: Julian Edelman
programme.desc: Follow Julian Edelman's journey from an injury in 2017 to a Super Bowl MVP.

programme.title: Inside the NFL: 2019: Week 8
programme.desc: The crew analyzes the San Francisco 49ers’ season thus far and what is to come. Plus, New York Yankee great CC Sabathia joins the show to share his opinions on his beloved Oakland Raiders and more.

programme.title: Shameless: We Become What We ... Frank!
programme.desc: The Gallaghers find themselves with money to burn as Carl sells their inheritance from Monica. Meanwhile, Fiona swears off random hookups to focus on her new apartment building. Lip deals with the sacrifice that comes with sobriety.

programme.title: Shameless: Where's My Meth?
programme.desc: Frank re-lives his 20s and joins the workforce for the first time. Meanwhile, Fiona grapples with evicting someone from her building. Lip works out a plan to sabotage Charlie's chances with Sierra. Ian and Carl make a troubling discovery about Monica.

programme.title: Shameless: God Bless Her Rotting Soul
programme.desc: A violent meth dealer threatens the Gallaghers, forcing Ian, Carl, Lip and Debbie to find a way to pay him off without involving Fiona. In the meantime, Fiona battles it out with a vindictive tenant. Lip cares for a down-and-out Professor Youens.

programme.title: Shameless: F**k Paying It Forward
programme.desc: A blast from the past shakes up Fiona's view of her life. Meanwhile, Frank gets involved with Liam's school and becomes the most popular dad in the PTA, and Lip learns getting laid is harder than anticipated when sober.

programme.title: Shameless: The (Mis)Education of Liam Fergus Beircheart Gallagher
programme.desc: As Fiona tries to raise the profile of the neighborhood, Ian helps Trevor to raise money for a new youth shelter. Meanwhile, Carl loses his scholarship and gets creative with securing the tuition and Lip stands up to a friend and gets hurt.

programme.title: Shameless: Icarus Fell and Rusty Ate Him
programme.desc: Fiona is forced to reflect on her own life after a lonely tenant dies and the duty of cleaning out the apartment falls upon her. Debbie has a pregnancy scare and winds up in a compromising position. Lip enlists Carl's help to search for his sponsor.

programme.title: Shameless: Occupy Fiona
programme.desc: Ian tests Fiona's patience and resolve by bringing a messy 'Occupy Fiona' movement right to her front door. Lip struggles to get Professor Youens to court for his DUI trial. A now unemployed Frank goes on a job hunt. Carl gets a feisty new rehab client.

programme.title: Shameless: Frank's Northern Southern Express
programme.desc: Frank starts a booming import-export business and Fiona considers moving into her own place after Ford shows her a side of Chicago she's never seen. Meanwhile, Ian confronts a pastor trying to 'pray the gay away'.

programme.title: Power: Confidential: Scorched Earth
programme.desc: The official after-show of 'Power' with behind-the-scenes insights.

programme.title: Movie: McFarland, USA
programme.desc: A PE teacher takes a job at a predominantly Latino high school in a small California town, and puts together what becomes a championship cross-country team.

programme.title: In the Long Run

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Empire State of Bride
programme.desc: The entire Kleinfeld team comes together as a family to help Emily, who needs a dress for her 10-year vow renewal atop the Empire State Building in just two days. Olympian Queen Harrison faces new hurdles while deciding on her dream wedding gown.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Surprise, Surprise!
programme.desc: Tumi lost 175 lbs. and has a special guest waiting for her: Jillian Michaels. Megan leaves the salon for a surprise proposal and a trip.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: I'll Know It When I See It
programme.desc: Bride Brooke wants a unique, one of kind gown, and won't settle for anything less. Bling queen Amanda hopes to add even more bling to her wedding dress.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Apple of His Eye
programme.desc: Missy brings her opinionated brothers to help her find the dress of her dreams. Back for her fitting, Donn longs for her brother's approval.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: A Mother's Touch
programme.desc: Dana is looking for her dream dress that her recently departed mother would approve of. Katy wants to add fabric from her late mother's gown to her dress.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: A Family Affair
programme.desc: Saralyn is in need of two dresses in order to share her wedding with her sister Megan who has Down syndrome.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Mom's Day, Mom's Way
programme.desc: Dina is 50 and fabulous and is looking for a dress as sassy as she is. Laura wants a simple lace dress but is having trouble pleasing her young entourage. Shandel wants to look glamorous in a fitted dress but her daughter, Paige, doesn't agree.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Sisters Know Best
programme.desc: Amy and her twin sister have very different opinions on dress style, and Heather struggles to please her picky sister.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Not What I Had in Mind
programme.desc: LaQuet is looking for a fun gown with straps. Kat wants a one-of-a-kind dress with no sweetheart neckline, but the consultants put her in one anyway. Valerie wants a mermaid silhouette until she realizes they may not be for her.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Race to the Altar
programme.desc: Rita is searching for the perfect 1940's style gown to match her theme. Natalie is searching for an untraditional gown that fits her full size frame.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Daddy Dearest
programme.desc: Emily and her very opinionated father want the perfect princess ball gown for her big day. Bride Danielle's father passed away, and she hopes to find a gown he would have loved.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: A Situation in the Salon
programme.desc: Mike 'The Situation' Sorrentino arrives at Kleinfeld to help younger sister Melissa find her wedding gown, but he and his brothers keep stealing her spotlight. Meanwhile, bride-to-be Ashley is upstaged by her flower girl's custom-made Pnina dress.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: I Want My Daughter to Look Like a Sexpot
programme.desc: Randy's mom visits for her 93rd birthday, and she's happy to share her fiery opinions with everyone shopping at Kleinfeld. Timid bride Courtney's appointment gets hijacked by her very provocative mother. Katie needs a gown suitable for two big secrets.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Not Hell Nor High Water
programme.desc: Randy is in Louisiana to save bride Kelli's big day after she lost everything in a devastating flood. Social media star Claudia Oshrey, aka Girl With No Job, brings sass to her appointment. Pnina Tornai feels the heat during Bridal Fashion Week.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: My Sisters are Picking Out My Dress!
programme.desc: Arlicia is letting her opinionated sisters plan her entire wedding, including choosing her wedding dress. Ameena has an unlimited budget and bridezilla tendencies. Karen is especially thankful to be shopping today after nearly losing her fiancé.

programme.title: Unexpected: How I Broke My Water
programme.desc: Hailey and Matthew welcome their baby girl, and a whole lot of drama, into the world. Max learns that he's going to rehab, and breaks the news to Chloe. Tyra's family looks for a new house. Rilah is rushed to the hospital.

programme.title: Unexpected: Missing Child
programme.desc: Anthony starts to think more seriously about his relationship with Rilah. Alex tells his grandmother he's moving out, but immediately has second thoughts. The rehab has a bed for Max, but the timing isn't great. McKayla starts her post-Caelan life.

programme.desc: Gary gets a set of legs to keep up with SpongeBob, but makes his owner look sluggish by comparison. And, Plankton practices ruling the world by shrinking himself and declaring himself king od SpongeBob's aquarium.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Krabby Patty That Ate Bikini Bottom / Bubble Buddy Returns
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs uses Sandy's experimental growth formula on a Krabby Patty and the results are disastrous.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Unreal Estate/ Code Yellow
programme.desc: When SpongeBob thinks he's allergic to his pineapple, Squidward offers to help find him a new home. Squidward is getting a nose job at the local hospital, and SpongeBob tags along as moral support.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Feral Friends/ Don't Wake Patrick
programme.desc: A strange moon turns everyone in town into wild animals, and Sandy's the only one who can save them. Patrick is sleepwalking and SpongeBob can't wake him up.

programme.title: The Loud House: Love Birds/ Rocket Men
programme.desc: Lincoln and Clyde beg their parents to let them go to space cadets camp, but it's not as fun as they expected. After Walt's failed attempt at romance, Charles, Cliff and Geo try to find their pal a love connection.

programme.title: The Loud House: Roughin' It/ The Waiting Game
programme.desc: Lincoln is worried that he's lost his manliness from growing up with all sisters, so he and Clyde go camping. Lincoln gets Lori a job at a pizza arcade, but when he starts to ask favors of her, Lori gets in hot water.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Crash Landing
programme.desc: After thousands of hours of painstaking preparation and dangerous flying, a terrible accident devastates the waterbomber crew in Turkey, and everyone at Buffalo. Wilf's first run as flight attendant raises eyebrows among the staff.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Cold Start
programme.desc: A landing gear collapse right on the runway sends everyone scrambling. Everything goes wrong trying to get a frozen DC4 airborne.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Gear Lock
programme.desc: Devan runs into gear problems when he ferries a mothballed DC3 across the country and a cold snap triggers problems at Buffalo.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Shootout
programme.desc: Rookie co-pilot David faces a remote Arctic airstrip with sketchy landing gear. Mikey drafts a Buffalo hockey team to face off against an NHL squad in a charity shootout. Chuck gets a chance to shine on the ice.

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: Casualties of War
programme.desc: With winter's first blow, new recruit John must save a snow plow stuck in an icy river. While Jamie pushes further into new territory, changes rock the company, forcing Colin to take on a new role. The community says farewell to a Heavy Rescue legend.

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: Saved on Preacher's Corner
programme.desc: Jamie's new B.C. crew struggles with a mangled trailer on a blind corner. When Colin slips up on a big recovery in Alberta, Jamie's brother must take over the job, even though he's a rookie on the rotator; Brandon steps up to a new role.

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: War Zone
programme.desc: When a lumber truck and diesel tanker collide, the flaming wreckage is the biggest recovery of Colin's career. As snowstorms pummel the Coquihalla, Al Quiring heads up the hill. In freezing rain, John faces off against a mangled tractor.

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: Holidays Thru Hell
programme.desc: A semi plows off a bridge, leaving a trailer and three RVs dangling over a raging river. John must get holiday traffic moving and prove himself on a multi-part recovery unlike anything they've faced.

programme.title: Defying Death: Heroes & Survivors: The Race To Survive
programme.desc: Caught in a savage storm, a day on a lake turns deadly. Tourists must escape an epic flash flood. The hunt for kids trapped in a flooded cave. A rockslide threatens tourists.

programme.title: Defying Death: Heroes & Survivors: Wildfire and Whitewater
programme.desc: Winds whip up a deadly wildfire that torches a town. Ferocious ocean waves leave storm watchers stranded. White water rafters are pummeled by rain and rocks during a trip down the Grand Canyon.

programme.title: Defying Death: Heroes & Survivors: Severe Weather Survivors
programme.desc: A microburst in Mexico brings down a plane while a rare tornado outbreak catches an entire town off guard.

programme.title: Defying Death: Heroes & Survivors: Wind Whipped & Waterlogged
programme.desc: An adventure turns terrifying when a hiker gets stuck in quicksand while backcountry skiers fight for survival in a brutal blizzard. A surfer gets lost at sea and innocent animals fight for survival in hurricane aftermath.

programme.title: Storm Stories: The Next Chapter: Harvey Hammers Houston
programme.desc: As Hurricane Harvey hammers Houston, Texas, it becomes the most extreme rainfall event in US history. A local realtor heads out in his boat to rescue a woman and her family.

programme.title: Storm Stories: The Next Chapter: Twin Twisters
programme.desc: Two powerful tornadoes take aim at a Nebraska farming community at the same time. Bank employees take cover in a vault, while a mother and her daughter are buried in the rubble.

programme.title: Hoarders: Phyllis/ Janet
programme.desc: Phyllis' house is packed with a floor to ceiling collection of bags stuffed with dolls. Janet has to crawl over mountains of garbage to get to the one recliner where she eats and sleeps.

programme.title: Hoarders: Stacey/ Roi
programme.desc: Stacey has two days to get rid of the 47 dogs and cats that have taken over her house, or she may lose both her daughter and her home. Roi has been evicted from his home, as there are too many dangerous hazards there.

programme.title: Hoarders: Mike/ Bonnie
programme.desc: Mike's house is so toxic that a virus she contracted in the home caused her kidneys to fail, nearly killing her. Bonnie's home is hoarded and in need of repair.

programme.title: Hoarders: Dorothy and David and Doris
programme.desc: Dorothy and David fell in love with each other over their mutual love of hoarding. Their home is so packed now it has become physically unsafe for Dorothy, and doctors have said one more fall in the hoard could paralyze her.

programme.title: Hoarders: Ruby and Mary
programme.desc: Ruby's house is so hoarded she spends her entire day living in the car, and her grandson has started running the streets of LA.

programme.title: Hoarders: Jim/ Susan
programme.desc: Jim and his wife will be homeless and the grandchildren that he has custody of will become wards of the state if he doesn't clean his home. Susan's daughter is threatening to call Protective Services if her mom doesn't clean up.

programme.title: Hoarders: Judy/ Jerry
programme.desc: Judy hoarded herself out of her house and used cancer surgery as an excuse to stay with a friend. Jerry hoarded himself out of a lovely half million-dollar property in a desirable neighbourhood.

programme.desc: The pumpkin spice phenomenon hits the Holiday Baking Championship. For the pre-heat, nine bakers attempt to wow the judges with creative pumpkin spiciness. In the main heat, the bakers must combine a yule log with a classic holiday treat.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: Plenty of Gratitude
programme.desc: For the pre-heat, the eight bakers work in teams to make four different kinds of pies. In the main heat, the bakers embrace the stuffed feeling after the Thanksgiving meal by making stuffed cakes featuring seasonal ingredients.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: Turkey Day Delights
programme.desc: In the pre-heat, seven bakers must make a dessert combining cranberry with another flavour of the season. The main heat challenges the bakers to create a sweet treat that pairs coffee with an unusual flavour of coffee syrup.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: Holiday Artistry
programme.desc: The holidays are a time for artistry and decorations, so for the pre-heat, inflatable holiday decorations inspire the six bakers' cute cream puff displays. In the main heat, the bakers dazzle the judges with delicious hand-painted eggnog cakes.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: Light and Inspiring
programme.desc: The Festival of Lights ignites creativity in the pre-heat, when the five bakers have to update traditional rugelach with unexpected new flavors like cardamom, grapefruit, guava paste, peanut butter or chai.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: New Family Classics
programme.desc: The remaining four bakers are going cocoa-loco for the holiday season in the chocolaty pre-heat, when they have to combine common pantry ingredients like balsamic vinegar, potato chips, oatmeal, red wine, olive oil and more.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: Gifts Of Greatness
programme.desc: Three bakers remain in the competition, and in the pre-heat, they have to create a beautiful edible holiday ornament display. For the final main heat, the bakers channel holiday gift shopping by creating a cake that is decorated like a gift.

programme.title: Farmhouse Rules: Wholesome Harvest
programme.desc: After the busy holidays, Nancy Fuller and her husband, David, need to start the year off right, so Nancy's putting together a menu of light and fresh meals. To start off, she's whipping up a get up and go smoothie that packs a punch.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Time To Pull The Curtain On Crepes
programme.desc: Bobby Flay loves crepes for brunch, and creates a variety of them including smoked salmon with ricotta, caper crepes with herb sauce, and ham and cheese egg crepes with mustard sauce.

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen: Sweet and Spicy
programme.desc: Guy Fieri doesn't love candy, so when his chef friends visit the ranch for Halloween, they know to mix heat with the sweet. Amanda Freitag starts off the meal with a red hot-blood orange margarita made with spicy cinnamon syrup.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: The Days Grow Shorter And The Nights Longer
programme.desc: Valerie and her husband, Tom, are entertaining two of their good pals and heating up the fun with Valerie's slow cooker mulled wine, fried chickpeas with sage and parmesan.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Old Friends, New Friends
programme.desc: Ree's throwing a welcome home dinner for friends moving back to her town.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Family Matters
programme.desc: To welcome Ree's father and stepmom to the ranch for dinner, Ladd's grilling the steaks, while Ree whips up all the fixings.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Essential Cooking Tools
programme.desc: Ree finds some great tools at a local kitchen store to give as a wedding gift. As she purchases the tools, she shares some great dishes she can make with each.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Anniversary
programme.desc: It's Ree Drummond and her husband Ladd's anniversary, so to celebrate she's cooking a meal for the whole family. She prepares an Elway's wedge salad, prime rib for five and squaw bread with honey butter.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Molly's Baby Shower

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Cook Like a Pro: Spicy
programme.desc: Some like it hot, and some like it spicy, so Ina Garten is making dishes to please both. She starts with an exotic lamb and chickpea curry made with a fragrant mix of spices, and her lobster corn fritters are paired with creamy sriracha sauce.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Cook Like a Pro: Chocolate
programme.desc: Ina Garten shares professional tips for chocolate, starting with an off-the-scale delicious chocolate ganache cake, complete with a chevron frosting tutorial. Then, chocolate crème brulee is taken to dazzling new dessert heights.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Bounty of Fall Flavors

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Secrets of the Terror Tunnels
programme.desc: A vast system of tunnels built almost three thousand years ago was the site of the greatest battles of antiquity, and these disorienting passages could be the deadliest weapon in war. Experts reveal what made this underground world so terrifying.

programme.desc: Police must sift through puzzling evidence and misleading accounts in order to solve a young girl's mysterious disappearance.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Lady Vanishes
programme.desc: On November 7, 2014, 69-year old Ina Clare Richardson is found brutally murdered in a public park in Clarkston, Washington. With no witnesses to the crime, investigators turn to surveillance cameras to piece together the puzzle of her fateful final night.

programme.title: See No Evil: A Date with Dalene
programme.desc: On August 6th 2011, Dalene Carlson vanishes during a Saturday night on the town. Security footage from a local bar reveals a number of potential suspects, each with a motive.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Graveyard Shift
programme.desc: On October 1st, 2009, 37-year-old Natasha Cournoyer disappears without a trace in Laval, Canada. As her friends and family struggle for answers, detectives must follow a stone-cold trail to uncover her final footsteps caught on surveillance cameras.

programme.title: See No Evil: Gentle Giant
programme.desc: On August 25, 2015, 51-year-old care worker Torrance Cheeves is found stabbed to death in his San Antonio, Texas home. With no suspects and a trail of puzzling evidence, investigators turn to surveillance cameras in the surrounding area for answers.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Man in the Black Hat
programme.desc: On April 14, 2009, 25-year old student Julissa Brisman is found shot and bound in an upmarket hotel room in Boston. With no witnesses to the crime, investigators turn to surveillance cameras in the surrounding area and quickly unravel a serial attacker.

programme.title: See No Evil: Call Me Back, Chris
programme.desc: In February 2008, Christopher Duncan left his apartment in San Antonio Texas, never to return again. Police have little to go on until surveillance footage has the potential to reveal the identity of a dangerous killer.

programme.title: See No Evil: Life After Midnight
programme.desc: In February 2015, the body of 26-year-old Celina Petersen is found dumped in an alley in South Park, Seattle. When police recover surveillance footage from across the neighborhood, they begin to unravel the shocking truth behind her murder.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Mississippi Delta
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the iconic soul food of the Mississippi Delta. From fried catfish and hushpuppies to smothered oxtails and decadent mud pie, the Deep South's down-home dishes soothe the soul.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Chiang Mai
programme.desc: Andrew reveals the most iconic foods of Chiang Mai, Thailand. From coconut curry soup to a signature sausage with pork and chile paste, fish roasted in banana leaves to minced pork salad, the northern city has a regional cuisine unlike any other.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Hyderabad
programme.desc: Andrew explores the aromatic treasures of Hyderabad, India. From savory potato pastries and silver-garnished syrupy fried bread to spicy pancakes and hearty meals of meat and rice, Hyderabad's menus are fit for royalty.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Shanghai
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern introduces the popular tastes of Shanghai, China. From creamy hairy crab and savory pork-filled dumplings to rice wine-soaked chicken and scallion pancakes on the go, cuisine in this big city is sweet and simple.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Surprise Filled Cakes
